V003-N00005.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00005.label: 湿热弥漫三焦证
V003-N00005.aliases: 三焦湿热证； Damp heat affecting triple energizer pattern
V003-N00005.englishNames: Damp heat affecting the three jiao pattern
V003-N00005.pinyinNames: shī rè mí màn sān jiāo zhèng
V003-N00005.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00005.definition: Characterized by fever that cannot be resolved after sweating, body heaviness, gastric discomfort and masses, absence of thirst or thirst with little water intake, scanty, yellow urine and a sensation of incomplete evacuation after bowel movements. The tongue is red with a yellow, greasy coating. The pulse is slippery and rapid. This pattern often occurs when damp is mixed with heat.

V003-N00005.englishNames: syndrome of diffusive dampnessheat in sanjiao
V003-N00005.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V003-N00005.definition: 湿热之邪，弥漫全身，累及上中下三焦，以身热不扬，渴不多饮，咳嗽胸闷，腹胀呕恶，便溏不爽，小便短涩，舌红苔黄腻，脉濡数或滑数等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00005.pinyinNames: shi re mi man san jiao zheng
V003-N00005.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜三焦证候
V003-N00005.definition: 湿热弥漫全身，累及上中下三焦，以身热不扬，渴不多饮，咳嗽胸闷，腹胀呕恶，便溏不爽，小便短涩，舌红苔黄腻，脉濡数或滑数等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00009.label: 上焦湿热证
V003-N00009.aliases: Dampness and heat in the upper energizer pattern
V003-N00009.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dampness and heat in upper energizer; Damp heat in the upper jiao pattern; upper energizer dampness-heat pattern/syndrome
V003-N00009.pinyinNames: shang jiao shi re zheng; shàng jiāo shī rè zhèng
V003-N00009.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00009.definition: Characterized by fever, aversion to cold, body heaviness, cough, chest tightness and absence of sweating. The tongue coating is yellow and white. The pulse is soft and delayed. This pattern often occurs when damp heat affects the upper jiao.

V003-N00009.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准

V003-N00009.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V003-N00009.definition: 湿热病初期，湿热之邪侵袭上焦，以发热恶寒，头身困重，胸闷，咳嗽，无汗，苔黄白，脉濡数等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00009.label: 上焦湿热证
V003-N00009.englishNames: syndrome of dampnessheat in upper jiao
V003-N00009.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜三焦证候｜上焦病证
V003-N00009.definition: 湿热侵袭的开始阶段，上焦证候明显，以发热恶寒，头身困重，咳嗽胸闷，无汗，苔黄白，脉濡缓等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00009.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜三焦辨证类
V003-N00009.definition: a pattern/syndrome occurring at the initial stage of dampness-heat disease, generally manifested by chills and fever, heaviness feeling of the head and body, oppression in the chest, cough, absence of sweat and rapid soggy pulse

V003-N00010.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dryness and heat in upper energizer
V003-N00010.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜三焦证候类术语｜上焦证类

V003-N00010.label: 上焦燥热证
V003-N00010.aliases: Upper energizer dryness and heat pattern； Upper energizer dryness heat pattern
V003-N00010.englishNames: Dry heat in the upper jiao pattern; syndrome/pattern of dryness and heat in upper energizer
V003-N00010.pinyinNames: shang jiao zao re zheng; shàng jiāo zào rè zhèng
V003-N00010.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00010.definition: Characterized by fever, aversion to wind cold, thirst, unproductive cough, headache, scanty sweating, dry lips, a dry, sore throat, tinnitus, red eyes, gum swelling and dry skin. The tongue coating is white. The pulse is rapid and large. This pattern often occurs when dry heat affects the dispersing and descending of lung qi.

V003-N00013.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜三焦证候类术语｜下焦证类

V003-N00013.label: 下焦湿热证
V003-N00013.aliases: 湿热蕴结下焦证； Dampness and heat in the lower energizer pattern
V003-N00013.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dampness and heat in the lower energizer; Damp heat in the lower jiao pattern; lower energizer dampness-heat pattern/syndrome
V003-N00013.pinyinNames: xia jiao shi re zheng; xià jiāo shī rè zhèng
V003-N00013.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00013.definition: Characterized by urinary dribbling with a painful urination, loose stools with a strong odour, and lower abdominal distension and pain. Alternatively, urine retention, constipation, yellow, white and smelly vaginal discharge, fever and thirst may be present. The tongue is red with a yellow, greasy coating. The pulse is slippery and rapid. This pattern often occurs when damp heat affects the large intestine or urinary bladder.

V003-N00013.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V003-N00013.definition: 湿热病后期，湿热之邪侵入下焦大肠或膀胱等处，以小便淋漓灼痛或癃闭，大便腥臭稀溏或秘结，小腹胀痛，或带下黄臭，身热口渴，舌红苔黄腻，脉滑数为常见症的证候。

V003-N00013.label: 下焦湿热证
V003-N00013.englishNames: syndrome of dampnessheat in lower jiao
V003-N00013.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜三焦证候｜下焦病证
V003-N00013.definition: 湿热侵及下焦大肠或膀胱等处，以小便淋漓的痛或癃闭，大便腥臭稀溏或秘结，小腹胀痛，或带下黄白而腥臭，身热口渴，舌红苔黄腻，脉滑数等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00016.definition: 肾阳亏虚，机体失却温煦，以畏寒肢冷，腰膝以下尤甚，面色？白或黧黑，小便清长，夜尿多，舌淡苔白，脉弱等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00019.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00019.label: 中焦积热证
V003-N00019.aliases: 中焦实热证； Excess heat in the middle jiao
V003-N00019.englishNames: Heat accumulating in the middle jiao pattern
V003-N00019.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00019.definition: Characterized by fever, thirst, abdominal distension and pain, constipation and scanty, yellow urine. The tongue is red with a dry, yellow coating. The pulse is rapid and forceful. This pattern often occurs when heat accumulates in the middle jiao.

V003-N00019.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00019.label: 脾胃实热证
V003-N00019.aliases: 脾胃积热证； 脾胃热盛证； 中焦实热证； 中焦积热证； 中焦热盛证； Heat accumulating in the spleen and stomach/middle jiao pattern； Excess heat in the spleen and stomach/middle jiao pattern
V003-N00019.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of excess-heat in the spleen and stomach; Excess heat in the spleen and stomach pattern
V003-N00019.pinyinNames: pi wei shi re zheng; pí wèi shí rè zhèng
V003-N00019.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00019.definition: Characterized by a burning stomach ache that alleviates after eating cool-property food, fever, thirst, abdominal pain/distension, and constipation. A foul breath, red, painful mouth ulcerations, gum swelling, pain, and bleeding may also be present. The tongue is red with a yellow coating. The pulse is rapid. This pattern often occurs when exuberant fire heat accumulates in the spleen and stomach.

V003-N00019.label: 中焦实热证
V003-N00019.englishNames: syndrome of excessive heat in middle jiao
V003-N00019.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V003-N00019.definition: 中焦邪热炽盛，燥实内结，以发热口渴，脘腹胀痛，大便秘结，尿短黄，舌红苔黄燥，脉数有力等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00019.label: 脾胃实热证
V003-N00019.aliases: 脾胃积热证； 脾胃热盛证； 中焦实热证
V003-N00019.englishNames: syndrome of excessive heat in middle jiao
V003-N00019.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜三焦证候｜中焦病证
V003-N00019.definition: 火热炽盛，壅滞脾胃，以胃脘灼痛、喜冷，发热口渴，腹胀作痛，便秘，或口臭、口腔赤烂疼痛、牙龈肿痛、齿衄，舌红苔黄，脉数等为常见症的证候。

V003-N01954.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of warm heat in the middle energizer
V003-N01954.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜三焦证候类术语｜中焦证类
V003-N01954.definition: 因温热疫毒邪入中焦，邪热炽盛，或燥实内结所致。临床以发热，不恶寒，反恶热，汗出，烦渴引饮，面目红赤，或脘腹胀痛，大便秘结，小便短黄，舌质红，舌苔黄燥或焦，脉数有力等为特征的证候。

V003-N01954.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of heat accumulation in the spleen and stomach
V003-N01954.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜脾脏兼证类｜脾胃兼证｜脾胃实热证
V003-N01954.definition: 因脾胃积热所致。临床以口腔溃疡多发，或满口糜烂，周围红赤，疼痛、拒食，烦躁、多啼，口臭，涎多，小便短黄，大便干结，或发热，面赤，舌质红，舌苔黄，脉滑数等为特征的证候。

V003-N01954.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N01954.label: 中焦积热证
V003-N01954.aliases: 中焦实热证； Excess heat in the middle jiao
V003-N01954.englishNames: Heat accumulating in the middle jiao pattern
V003-N01954.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N01954.definition: Characterized by fever, thirst, abdominal distension and pain, constipation and scanty, yellow urine. The tongue is red with a dry, yellow coating. The pulse is rapid and forceful. This pattern often occurs when heat accumulates in the middle jiao.

V003-N01954.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N01954.label: 脾胃实热证
V003-N01954.aliases: 脾胃积热证； 脾胃热盛证； 中焦实热证； 中焦积热证； 中焦热盛证； Heat accumulating in the spleen and stomach/middle jiao pattern； Excess heat in the spleen and stomach/middle jiao pattern
V003-N01954.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of excess-heat in the spleen and stomach; Excess heat in the spleen and stomach pattern
V003-N01954.pinyinNames: pi wei shi re zheng; pí wèi shí rè zhèng
V003-N01954.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N01954.definition: Characterized by a burning stomach ache that alleviates after eating cool-property food, fever, thirst, abdominal pain/distension, and constipation. A foul breath, red, painful mouth ulcerations, gum swelling, pain, and bleeding may also be present. The tongue is red with a yellow coating. The pulse is rapid. This pattern often occurs when exuberant fire heat accumulates in the spleen and stomach.

V003-N01954.label: 中焦实热证
V003-N01954.englishNames: syndrome of excessive heat in middle jiao
V003-N01954.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V003-N01954.definition: 中焦邪热炽盛，燥实内结，以发热口渴，脘腹胀痛，大便秘结，尿短黄，舌红苔黄燥，脉数有力等为常见症的证候。

V003-N01954.label: 脾胃实热证
V003-N01954.aliases: 脾胃积热证； 脾胃热盛证； 中焦实热证
V003-N01954.englishNames: syndrome of excessive heat in middle jiao
V003-N01954.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜三焦证候｜中焦病证
V003-N01954.definition: 火热炽盛，壅滞脾胃，以胃脘灼痛、喜冷，发热口渴，腹胀作痛，便秘，或口臭、口腔赤烂疼痛、牙龈肿痛、齿衄，舌红苔黄，脉数等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00020.label: 中焦湿热证
V003-N00020.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dampness and heat in the middle energizer
V003-N00020.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜三焦证候类术语｜中焦证类

V003-N00020.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dampness and heat in the liver and spleen
V003-N00020.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜肝脏兼证类｜肝脾兼证｜肝脾不调证

V003-N00020.aliases: 中焦湿热证； 湿热中阻证
V003-N00020.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dampness and heat in the spleen and stomach; pattern/syndrome of dampness-heat in the spleen and stomach
V003-N00020.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜脾脏兼证类｜脾胃兼证｜脾胃实热证

V003-N00020.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V003-N00020.label: 肝脾湿热证
V003-N00020.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dampness and heat in the liver and spleen
V003-N00020.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜肝脏兼证类｜肝脾兼证｜肝脾不调证
V003-N00020.definition: 因湿热中阻，壅结于肝脾所致。临床以胁胀或痛，脘腹痞闷，恶心、厌油，身目俱黄，口苦或腻，大便不爽或色白，舌质红，舌苔黄腻，脉弦滑或数，或伴见寒热往来，突发成簇水疱、疼痛剧烈等为特征的证候。

V003-N00020.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V003-N00020.label: 脾胃湿热证
V003-N00020.aliases: 中焦湿热证； 湿热中阻证
V003-N00020.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dampness and heat in the spleen and stomach; pattern/syndrome of dampness-heat in the spleen and stomach
V003-N00020.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜脾脏兼证类｜脾胃兼证｜脾胃实热证
V003-N00020.definition: 因湿热蕴结脾胃所致。临床以脘腹痞胀或痛，呕恶、不食，口腻或苦，渴不多饮，肢体困重，大便黏滞或淸泻，尿少色黄，舌质红，舌苔黄腻。脉濡数或滑，可伴见肢体肿胀等为特征的证候。

V003-N00020.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00020.label: 中焦湿热证
V003-N00020.aliases: Dampness and heat in the middle energizer pattern； Middle energizer dampness and heat pattern
V003-N00020.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dampness and heat in the middle energizer; Damp heat in the middle jiao pattern
V003-N00020.pinyinNames: zhong jiao shi re zheng; zhōng jiāo shī rè zhèng
V003-N00020.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00020.definition: Characterized by fever that cannot be resolved after sweating and become more pronounced in the afternoon, abdominal masses and distension, nausea, vomiting, a poor appetite, thirst with little water intake, yellow urine and loose stools. This pattern often occurs when damp heat affects the spleen and stomach.

V003-N00020.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00020.label: 肝脾湿热证
V003-N00020.aliases: 中焦湿热证； Damp heat in the middle jiao pattern
V003-N00020.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dampness and heat in the liver and spleen; Damp heat in the liver and spleen pattern
V003-N00020.pinyinNames: gan pi shi re zheng; gān pí shī rè zhèng
V003-N00020.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00020.definition: Characterized by distension in the subcostal region, abdominal bloating, nausea and aversion to oil. Alternatively, jaundice and a sensation of incomplete evacuation after bowel movements. The tongue is red with a yellow, greasy coating. The pulse is wiry, slippery and rapid. This pattern often occurs when damp heat affects the free flow of liver qi and transportation and transformation of the spleen.

V003-N00020.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00020.label: 脾胃湿热证
V003-N00020.aliases: 中焦湿热证； 湿热中阻证； Damp heat in the middle jiao pattern
V003-N00020.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dampness and heat in the spleen and stomach; pattern/syndrome of dampness-heat in the spleen and stomach; Damp heat in the spleen and stomach pattern
V003-N00020.pinyinNames: pi wei shi re zheng; pí wèi shī rè zhèng
V003-N00020.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00020.definition: Characterized by feverish sensation (but no fever) that worsens in the afternoon, abdominal masses/distension, nausea, vomiting, a poor appetite, thirst but drink only a small amount of water, yellow urine, and loose stools. This pattern often occurs when damp heat affects the spleen and stomach.

V003-N00020.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V003-N00020.label: 中焦湿热证
V003-N00020.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜辨证

V003-N00020.label: 中焦湿热证
V003-N00020.englishNames: syndrome of dampnessheat in middle jiao; middle-energizer dampness-heat syndrome/pattern
V003-N00020.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V003-N00020.definition: 湿热病中期，湿热之邪侵入中焦脾胃，以身热不扬，午后热甚，脘腹痞胀，呕恶不食，渴不多饮，尿黄便溏，苔黄腻，脉滑数为常见症的证候。

V003-N00020.label: 脾胃湿热证
V003-N00020.aliases: 湿热伤中证； 湿热中阻证； 湿热阻胃证； 中焦湿热证
V003-N00020.englishNames: syndrome of dampnessheat of spleen and stomach
V003-N00020.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜三焦证候｜中焦病证
V003-N00020.definition: 湿热内蕴，脾胃失运，以脘腹痞胀，呕恶纳呆，肢体困重，便溏不爽，或面目发黄，或身热不扬，汗出热不解，渴不多饮，舌红苔黄腻，脉滑数等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00020.label: 脾胃湿热证

V003-N00020.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜脏腑辨证类
V003-N00020.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by epigastric or abdominal distention, anorexia, nausea, vomiting, lassitude, heaviness sensation of the body, or jaundice with bright yellow discoloration of the skin and the white of the eyes, yellow dense and slimy tongue

V003-N01880.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜三焦证候类术语｜中焦证类
V003-N01880.definition: 因湿热时邪或疫毒等侵犯中焦脾胃，气机痞塞所致。临床以身热不扬，或午后潮热，汗出、不渴，或渴不欲饮，口中黏腻，呕恶、不食，身重、困倦，尿少色黄，舌质红，舌苔垢腻或黄，脉濡数或滑，伴见胸脘痞闷，恶心、呕吐，或腹痛、下利等为特征的证候。

V003-N01958.definition: 因湿热时邪或疫毒等侵犯中焦脾胃，气机痞塞所致。临床以身热不扬，或午后潮热，汗出、不渴，或渴不欲饮，口中黏腻，呕恶、不食，身重、困倦，尿少色黄，舌质红，舌苔垢腻或黄，脉濡数或滑，伴见胸脘痞闷，恶心、呕吐，或腹痛、下利等为特征的证候。

V003-N01958.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V003-N01958.label: 湿热中阻证
V003-N01958.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dampness and heat obstructing the middle
V003-N01958.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜病因证候类术语｜湿证类｜湿热证｜湿热内侵证
V003-N01958.definition: 因湿热内蕴，或湿热时邪疫毒侵淫，困阻中焦，脾胃纳运失司所致。临床以身热不扬，汗出不解，脘腹痞闷，泛恶、不食，口中黏腻或苦，渴不欲饮，肢体困重，大便黏滞不爽，小便短少，舌质红，舌苔黄滑或腻，脉濡数等为特征的证候。

V003-N01958.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V003-N01958.label: 肝脾湿热证
V003-N01958.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dampness and heat in the liver and spleen
V003-N01958.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜肝脏兼证类｜肝脾兼证｜肝脾不调证
V003-N01958.definition: 因湿热中阻，壅结于肝脾所致。临床以胁胀或痛，脘腹痞闷，恶心、厌油，身目俱黄，口苦或腻，大便不爽或色白，舌质红，舌苔黄腻，脉弦滑或数，或伴见寒热往来，突发成簇水疱、疼痛剧烈等为特征的证候。

V003-N01958.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM

V003-N01958.aliases: Dampness and heat in the middle energizer pattern； Middle energizer dampness and heat pattern
V003-N01958.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dampness and heat in the middle energizer; Damp heat in the middle jiao pattern
V003-N01958.pinyinNames: zhong jiao shi re zheng; zhōng jiāo shī rè zhèng
V003-N01958.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N01958.definition: Characterized by fever that cannot be resolved after sweating and become more pronounced in the afternoon, abdominal masses and distension, nausea, vomiting, a poor appetite, thirst with little water intake, yellow urine and loose stools. This pattern often occurs when damp heat affects the spleen and stomach.

V003-N01958.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N01958.label: 肝脾湿热证
V003-N01958.aliases: 中焦湿热证； Damp heat in the middle jiao pattern
V003-N01958.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dampness and heat in the liver and spleen; Damp heat in the liver and spleen pattern
V003-N01958.pinyinNames: gan pi shi re zheng; gān pí shī rè zhèng
V003-N01958.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N01958.definition: Characterized by distension in the subcostal region, abdominal bloating, nausea and aversion to oil. Alternatively, jaundice and a sensation of incomplete evacuation after bowel movements. The tongue is red with a yellow, greasy coating. The pulse is wiry, slippery and rapid. This pattern often occurs when damp heat affects the free flow of liver qi and transportation and transformation of the spleen.

V003-N01958.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N01958.label: 脾胃湿热证
V003-N01958.aliases: 中焦湿热证； 湿热中阻证； Damp heat in the middle jiao pattern
V003-N01958.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dampness and heat in the spleen and stomach; pattern/syndrome of dampness-heat in the spleen and stomach; Damp heat in the spleen and stomach pattern
V003-N01958.pinyinNames: pi wei shi re zheng; pí wèi shī rè zhèng
V003-N01958.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N01958.definition: Characterized by feverish sensation (but no fever) that worsens in the afternoon, abdominal masses/distension, nausea, vomiting, a poor appetite, thirst but drink only a small amount of water, yellow urine, and loose stools. This pattern often occurs when damp heat affects the spleen and stomach.

V003-N00022.definition: Characterized by high fever, thirst, chest tightness, panting, rapid breathing, phlegm sounds in the throat, restlessness, delirium, abdominal distension/pain/tenderness, and scanty, dark-yellow urine or hesitant, painful urination. The tongue is rough with a dry, yellow coating. The pulse is replete and forceful. Contributing factors may include six pathogenic factors, parasites or dysfunctions of the zang–fu organs (subsequent food stagnation, retention of phlegm/fluid/water/dampness and blood stasis).

Often results from unresolved pathogenic factors in the exterior coupled with internal retention of undigested food, accumulated heat, phlegm fluid, water dampness, stagnant blood, dry faeces, pus, parasites and stones.

V003-N00039.label: 热证
V003-N00039.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V003-N00039.definition: 热邪侵袭，或阳气亢盛，以身热烦躁，面目红赤，唇红而干，咽燥口渴，喜冷饮，大便秘结，小便短赤，舌红苔黄，脉数等为常见症的热性证候。

V003-N00039.definition: 由阳盛或阴虚所产生的以温热表现为主的一类证候，临床表现为发热恶热，喜冷，口渴喜冷饮，面红目赤，烦躁昏谵，或痰、涕黄稠，或吐血衄血，小便短赤，大便干结，舌红苔燥，脉滑数等。

V003-N00039.definition: 指热邪炽盛，蕴郁肌肤，导致痈肿疮疡的病理变化。

V003-N00039.definition: 指血分热盛而动血耗血，或血脉受热而不能壅遏营血，导致出血的病机。

The tongue coating is thin and white or slightly yellow. The pulse is superficial and rapid. Often occurs when wind, heat or summer dryness attacks the surface of the body.

V003-N00041.definition: Characterized by fever, mild aversion to cold/wind, sweating, thirst, and red, sore throat. The tongue tip is red with a thin, yellow coating. The pulse is superficial and rapid. Often occurs when wind heat attacks the surface of the body and affects the normal functioning of the Wei-defence.

V003-N01265.definition: 因温热疫毒等邪由口鼻而入，侵袭肺卫，肺失宣降所致。临床以发热，微恶风寒，咳嗽，咯痰黄白，咽赤肿痛，口渴，鼻流浊涕，舌边尖红，舌苔白或微黄，脉浮数或弦数等为特征的证候。

V003-N00050.definition: 疾病本质为虚，因脏腑机能失调，气化障碍而见某些盛实假象的证候。

V003-N00051.definition: 泛指因各种原因致使阳气亏损，脏腑机能衰退，或阳不制阴，甚或亡阳等引起的一类证候。

V003-N00051.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00051.label: 虚寒证
V003-N00051.aliases: 里虚寒证； 脏腑虚寒证； 脏腑虚冷证
V003-N00051.englishNames: Deficiency cold pattern; deficiency cold pattern/syndrome; syndrome/pattern of deficiency cold
V003-N00051.pinyinNames: xu han zheng; xū hán zhèng
V003-N00051.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00051.definition: Characterized by a bright, pale complexion, cold intolerance, and clear, profuse urine. The tongue is pale with a white coating. The pulse is deep, slow or deep, thready and weak. Contributing factors may include constitutional yang qi deficiency, chronic internal dysfunctions or inappropriate treatment damaging yang qi.

V003-N00051.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00051.label: 阳虚证
V003-N00051.aliases: 阳虚证类； 阳气虚证； 虚寒证； 阳虚内寒证； 阳气亏虚证
V003-N00051.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of yang deficiency; yang deficiency pattern/syndrome; Yang deficiency pattern
V003-N00051.pinyinNames: yang xu zheng; yáng xū zhèng
V003-N00051.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00051.definition: Characterized by cold intolerance, cold limbs, lassitude, fatigue, shortness of breath, tastelessness, absence of thirst or preference for hot water, clear urine, and loose stools. Alternatively, scanty urine, oedema and a pale face may be present. The tongue is pale and enlarged. The pulse is deep, slow and weak. Often occurs when yang qi fails to warm and nourish the zang–fu organs.

V003-N00051.label: 阳虚证
V003-N00051.englishNames: yang deficiency syndrome; yang deficiency syndrome/pattern
V003-N00051.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V003-N00051.definition: 阳气不足，失去温煦推动；以畏寒肢冷，尿清便塘，舌淡胖，脉沉迟无力等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00051.label: 阳虚证
V003-N00051.aliases: 虚寒证； 阳气亏虚证； 阳气虚衰证； 阳气虚证； 阳虚内寒证
V003-N00051.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜阴阳证候
V003-N00051.definition: 阳气亏损，失却温煦推动，脏腑机能衰退，以畏寒肢冷，神疲乏力，气短，口淡不渴，或喜热饮，尿清便溏，或尿少浮肿，面白，舌淡胖，脉沉迟无力等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00051.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V003-N00051.label: 虚寒证
V003-N00051.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜八纲辨证
V003-N00051.definition: a cold pattern/syndrome arising from deficiency of yang qi, the same as the yang deficiency pattern/ syndrome

V003-N00364.label: 虚寒证

V003-N00364.englishNames: deficiency cold pattern/syndrome; syndrome/pattern of deficiency cold
V003-N00364.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜八纲证候类术语｜虚证
V003-N00364.definition: 因秉质阳气不足，或脏腑内伤久病，或误治伤损阳气所致。临床以四肢不温，喜暖畏冷，面色淡白或？白，舌质淡，舌苔白，脉沉迟或沉细无力，可伴见反复感冒，咳嗽，眩晕，耳鸣，心悸，健忘，大便溏薄，小便清长或夜尿频等为特征的证候。

V003-N00364.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候

V003-N00364.definition: 泛指因秉质阳虚，或久病损伤阳气，温煦、推动失职，脏腑机能衰退等所引起的一类证候。

V003-N00364.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V003-N00364.label: 阳虚内寒证
V003-N00364.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of yang deficiency with internal cold
V003-N00364.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜阳证类｜阳虚证｜阳气亏虚证
V003-N00364.definition: 因阳气亏虚，阴寒内生所致。临床以恶寒、喜暖，肢冷、蜷卧，面色苍白，精神委顿，四肢不温或厥冷，口淡、不渴，痰涎或带下清稀，小便清长，大便溏薄，舌质淡胖嫩，舌苔白而润滑，脉沉迟弱等为特征的证候。

V003-N00364.definition: a pattern/syndrome resulting from deficiency of yang qi with reduction in its warming and activating power, manifested by intolerance of cold, cold extremities, spontaneous sweating, loose bowel, long voidings of clear urine, pale tongue, and deep and

V003-N00052.label: 虚热证
V003-N00052.englishNames: deficiency heat pattern/syndrome; syndrome/pattern of deficiency heat
V003-N00052.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜八纲证候类术语｜虚证

V003-N00052.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00052.label: 阴虚内热证
V003-N00052.englishNames: Yin deficiency-induced internal heat pattern; pattern/syndrome of yin deficiency with internal heat
V003-N00052.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00052.definition: Characterized by a persistent low-grade fever, night sweats, flushed cheeks, a dry mouth with a desire to drink water, scanty, yellow urine and constipation. The tongue is dry and red. The pulse is thready and rapid. Often occurs when deficiency of yin fluids generates internal heat.

V003-N00052.label: 阴虚内热证
V003-N00052.englishNames: syndrome of endogenous heat due to yin deficiency; syndrome/pattern of yin deficiency and internal heat
V003-N00052.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V003-N00052.definition: 阴液不足，虚热内生；以低热或午后潮热、手足心热、五心烦热，颧红，盗汗，口干不欲饮，便秘尿短，舌红少苔，或光红无苔，脉细数等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00052.label: 阴虚内热证
V003-N00052.englishNames: syndrome of endogenous heat due to yin deficiency
V003-N00052.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜阴阳证候｜阴虚证
V003-N00052.definition: 阴液亏虚，虚热内生，以低热不退，盗汗颧红，口干欲饮，小便短黄，大便干结，舌红少津，脉细数等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00052.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V003-N00052.label: 虚热证
V003-N00052.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜八纲辨证
V003-N00052.definition: a heat pattern/syndrome caused by deficiency of yin, qi, blood or fluids

V003-N00053.label: 表里俱虚证
V003-N00053.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dual internal and external deficiency; pattern/syndrome of dual exterior and interior deficiency
V003-N00053.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜八纲证候类术语｜虚证

V003-N00053.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V003-N00053.label: 表里俱虚证
V003-N00053.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dual exterior and interior deficiency
V003-N00053.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜辨证

V003-N00053.label: 表里俱虚证
V003-N00053.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜表里证候｜表里同病
V003-N00053.definition: 表里同病之一，症见汗出恶风、气弱少言、头晕心悸、四肢倦怠、食少便溏，舌质淡嫩，脉象细弱。可因体质素虚，误汗虚表而致，也见于大病后气血两虚患者。

V003-N00053.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V003-N00053.label: 表里俱虚证
V003-N00053.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of dual exterior and interior deficiency
V003-N00053.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜八纲辨证
V003-N00053.definition: a deficiency pattern/syndrome involving both the exterior and the interior, usually manifested by sweating with aversion to wind, shortage of qi and reluctance to speak, decreased food intake, loose bowels, pale tongue and weak pulse

V003-N00054.label: 表证
V003-N00054.englishNames: external syndrome/pattern; Exterior Syndrome; exterior pattern/ syndrome; Exterior pattern
V003-N00054.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜八纲证候类术语

V003-N00054.label: 表证
V003-N00054.englishNames: external syndrome/pattern; Exterior Syndrome; exterior pattern/ syndrome; Exterior pattern
V003-N00054.path: ICD-11中文-传统医学部分｜传统医学证候｜八纲证

V003-N00054.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00054.label: 表证
V003-N00054.englishNames: external syndrome/pattern; Exterior pattern; Exterior Syndrome; exterior pattern/ syndrome
V003-N00054.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00054.definition: Characterized by aversion to wind/cold, fever, headache, and body aches. The tongue coating is thin. The pulse is floating. These signs and symptoms are often seen in the early stage of externally contracted conditions that have a sudden onset, superficial location and a short duration. Often occurs when exogenous pathogenic factors affect the interstices, joints and head.

V003-N00054.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V003-N00054.label: 表证
V003-N00054.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜辨证

V003-N00054.label: 表证
V003-N00054.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V003-N00054.definition: 外感病的初期，起病较急，病位较浅，病情较轻，病程较短，以发热恶寒或恶风、头身痛、舌苔薄白、脉浮为常见症的证候。

V003-N00054.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V003-N00054.label: 表证
V003-N00054.englishNames: exterior pattern/ syndrome; Exterior Syndrome; superficies syndrome
V003-N00054.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜八纲证候｜表里证候
V003-N00054.definition: 外感邪气经皮毛、口鼻侵入人体，正气（卫气）抗邪而表现于体表的轻浅证候。临床表现为发热恶寒（可恶风）、头身疼痛、舌苔薄白、脉浮。

V003-N00054.label: 表证
V003-N00054.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜表里证候
V003-N00054.definition: 是指六淫，疫疠，虫毒等邪气经皮毛，口鼻侵入机体，正气（卫气）抗邪所表现轻浅证候的概括。表证主要见于外感疾病初期阶段。

V003-N00054.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V003-N00054.label: 表证
V003-N00054.englishNames: exterior pattern/ syndrome; Exterior Syndrome; superficies syndrome
V003-N00054.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜八纲辨证
V003-N00054.definition: a general term for patterns/syndromes that occur chiefly at the early stage of external contractions affecting the exterior part of the body, characterized by a sudden onset, aversion to cold or to wind, fever, headache, generalized pain, thin tongue

V003-N00055.label: 表实证
V003-N00055.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of external excess; exterior excess pattern/syndrome
V003-N00055.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜八纲证候类术语｜表证

V003-N00055.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00055.label: 表实证
V003-N00055.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of external excess; exterior excess pattern/syndrome; Exterior excess pattern
V003-N00055.pinyinNames: biao shi zheng; biǎo shí zhèng

V003-N00055.definition: Characterized by aversion to cold, fever, absence of sweating, headache and body aches. The pulse is superficial and tense. Often occurs when the struggle between yang qi and pathogenic factors closes the skin striae.

V003-N00076.definition: Characterized by fever, aversion to wind/cold, headache, body ache, lower back pain, nasal obstruction with clear discharge, and sweating. The pulse is superficial and delayed or superficial and tight. This pattern often occurs when wind cold affects the Taiyang meridian and disturbs the normal functioning of the Ying nutrients and Wei-defence.

V003-N00077.definition: Characterized by fever, aversion to cold/wind and sweating. The pulse is superficial and delayed. Alternatively, headache, neck rigidity, body ache, lower back pain, nasal obstruction with clear discharge and a thin, white tongue coating may be present. This pattern often occurs when wind cold attacks the Taiyang meridians and disturbs the harmony between the Ying nutrients and Wei-defence.

V003-N00077.englishNames: syndrome of affection of Taiyang by wind

V003-N00078.englishNames: Taiyang cold attack pattern; syndrome/pattern of taiyang cold damage; greater yang cold damage pattern/ syndrome

V003-N00078.definition: Characterized by aversion to cold, fever, headache, neck pain and rigidity, absence of sweating, and panting. The pulse is superficial and tight. This pattern often occurs when external wind cold obstructs Wei-defensive yang and closes the skin striae.

V003-N00080.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00080.definition: Characterized by thirst, restlessness, insomnia, mania, lower abdominal hardness/fullness, inhibited urination and vomiting immediately after drinking water. The pulse is deep and hesitant or deep and knotted. This pattern often occurs when pathogenic heat enters the fu organs and affects the qi transformation of the urinary bladder. It may also occur when heat and stagnant blood affects the lower abdomen.

V003-N00081.pinyinNames: tai yang xu shui zheng; tài yáng xù shuǐ zhèng

V003-N00081.definition: Characterized by lower abdominal bulging, distension and pain and inhibited urination. This pattern often occurs when the bladder fails to perform qi transformation, resulting in water retention.

V003-N00081.definition: 太阳经证不解，邪与水结，膀胱气化不利，水液停蓄，以发热恶寒、小便不利、少腹满、消渴、水入即吐、脉浮或浮数等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00081.label: 太阳蓄水证
V003-N00081.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜六经证候｜三阳病｜太阳病证｜太阳腑证

V003-N00081.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜六经辨证类
V003-N00081.definition: a type of greater yang bowel pattern/syndrome marked by disordered water metabolism, chiefly manifested by impaired urination and thirst but vomiting immediately after the ingestion of water, also called the greater yang water-retention

V003-N00082.englishNames: greater yang blood amassment pattern/ syndrome; syndrome/ pattern of taiyang amassment of blood; Taiyang disease with stagnated blood syndrome; syndrome/pattern of taiyang amassment of blood

V003-N00082.aliases: 太阳蓄血； 膀胱蓄血证； Blood accumulation in the bladder pattern； Blood and heat build up in the bladder pattern； Blood retention in the urinary bladder
V003-N00082.englishNames: greater yang blood amassment pattern/ syndrome; syndrome/ pattern of taiyang amassment of blood; Taiyang disease with stagnated blood syndrome; syndrome/pattern of taiyang amassment of blood; Taiyang blood retention pattern
V003-N00082.pinyinNames: tai yang xu xue zheng; tài yáng xù xuè zhèng

V003-N00082.definition: Characterized by lower abdominal distension and stabbing pain with a fixed location, and normal urination. The tongue is purple with ecchymosis. The pulse is wiry and hesitant. This pattern often results from abdominal injury or occurs when heat affects the urinary bladder, causing blood accumulating in the urinary bladder.

V003-N00095.definition: Characterized by aversion to cold without fever, diarrhoea with undigested food in stools, and cold limbs. The pulse is feeble and thready. This pattern often occurs when pathogenic factors enter the Shaoyin meridians and transform into cold, coupled with yang qi failure of the heart and kidney.

V003-N00095.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V003-N00095.definition: 少阴心肾阳衰，阴寒内盛，以无热恶寒，精神萎靡，但欲寐，四肢逆冷，下利清谷，脉微细或沉微欲绝为常见疾的证候。

V003-N00095.definition: a lesser yin pattern/syndrome with cold transformation of the pathogen which invades the heart and kidney, usually manifested as aversion to cold, cold limbs, sleepiness, lienteric diarrhea, pale tongue and sunken faint pulse

V003-N00096.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00096.definition: Characterized by restlessness, insomnia, and a dry mouth/throat. The pulse is thready and rapid. This pattern often occurs when pathogenic factors enter the Shao meridian and transform into heat, coupled with yang hyperactivity due to yin deficiency.

V003-N00096.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准

V003-N00096.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V003-N00096.definition: 少阴心肾阴亏，虚阳亢盛，以心烦不得卧，身热，口燥咽干，舌红少津，脉细数等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00096.label: 少阴热化证
V003-N00096.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜六经证候｜三阴病｜少阴病
V003-N00096.definition: 少阴阴虚阳亢，邪从阳化热，以心烦不得眠，口燥咽干，舌尖红，脉细数等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00100.label: 阳明经证

V003-N00100.definition: Characterized by a high-grade fever, aversion to heat instead of cold, profuse sweating, and excessive thirst with a strong desire to drink water. Alternatively, restlessness, panting, and a red face may be present. The tongue coating is dry and yellow. The pulse is surging and large. This pattern often occurs when hyperactive heat affects the Yangming meridians and the entire body.

V003-N00100.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V003-N00100.label: 阳明经证
V003-N00100.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜辨证

V003-N00100.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V003-N00100.definition: 邪热亢盛，充斥阳明之经，弥漫全身，肠中尚无燥屎内结，以身大热，汗大出，口大渴，脉洪大等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00100.definition: 邪热亢盛，充斥阳明之经，弥漫全身，肠中尚无燥屎内结，以身大热、汗大出、口大渴、脉洪大等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00100.label: 阳明热盛证
V003-N00100.aliases: syndrome of heat in yangming meridian
V003-N00100.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜六经证候｜三阳病｜阳明病证
V003-N00100.definition: 阳明胃热亢盛，腑气不通，热盛伤津，筋脉失养。以壮热汗出，项背强急，手足挛急，口噤啮齿，甚则角弓反张，腹满便秘，口渴喜冷饮。舌质红，苔黄燥，脉弦数为主要症状的证候。

V003-N00100.label: 阳明经证
V003-N00100.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜六经证候｜三阳病｜阳明病证
V003-N00100.definition: 邪热亢盛，充斥阳明之经，弥漫全身，肠中尚无燥屎内结，以身大热、汗大出、口大渴、脉洪大等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00100.label: 阳明经证
V003-N00100.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜六经辨证类
V003-N00100.definition: a pattern/syndrome caused by exuberant pathogenic heat flooding in the yang brightness meridian and spreading over the body but not yet inducing constipation, characteristically manifested by high fever without chills, profuse sweating, strong thirst

V003-N00101.label: 阳明腑实证
V003-N00101.aliases: 阳明燥结证； 阳明腑证； 阳明热结证； 阳明实证
V003-N00101.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜六经证候类术语｜阳明证类

V003-N00101.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00101.label: 阳明腑实证
V003-N00101.aliases: 阳明燥结证； 阳明腑证； 阳明热结证； 阳明实证； Yangming–fu organ pattern
V003-N00101.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of yangming fu-organ excess; Excess Yangming–fu organ pattern
V003-N00101.pinyinNames: yang ming fu shi zheng; yáng míng fǔ shí zhèng
V003-N00101.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00101.definition: Characterized by fever that aggravates in the afternoon, sweating of hands/feet, abdominal fullness, distension and pain with tenderness, and constipation. In severe cases, unconsciousness, delirium, restlessness, and insomnia may be present. The tongue coating is dry, yellow and thick or charred black with thorns. The pulse is deep and forceful , or slippery and rapid. This pattern often occurs when pathogenic heat enters the intestine and mixes with dry faeces.

V003-N00101.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V003-N00101.label: 阳明腑证
V003-N00101.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜辨证

V003-N00101.label: 阳明腑证
V003-N00101.englishNames: syndrome of fuviscera of Yangming; yang brightness fu-organ syndrome/pattern
V003-N00101.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V003-N00101.definition: 邪热伤津，与肠中糟粕相搏，燥屎内结，腑气不通，以日哺潮热，手足汗出，脐腹胀满疼痛，拒按，大便秘结，脉沉实有力为常见症的证候。

V003-N00101.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V003-N00101.label: 阳明腑证
V003-N00101.aliases: 阳明实证； Yangming Sthenic Syndrome
V003-N00101.englishNames: Syndrome of Fu Viscera of Yangming
V003-N00101.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜六经病｜三阳病｜阳明病
V003-N00101.definition: 邪热内盛，与肠中糟粕相搏，燥屎内结，以日晡潮热、手足汗出、脐腹胀满疼痛、大便秘结、脉沉实等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00101.label: 阳明腑证
V003-N00101.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜六经证候｜三阳病｜阳明病证
V003-N00101.definition: 邪热传里与肠中糟粕相搏而成燥屎内结的证候。有轻重之分，大承气汤证乃痞、满、燥实俱备；小承气汤证以痞、满为主；调胃承气汤证以燥、实为主。

V003-N00101.label: 阳明腑证
V003-N00101.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜六经辨证类
V003-N00101.definition: a pattern/syndrome caused by accumulation of pathogenic heat in the stomach and large intestine, manifested by tidal fever, abdominal distension, fullness and pain, constipation, agitation or even delirium

V003-N00104.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM

V003-N00104.definition: Characterized by sudden fainting or clouding of consciousness, limb flaccidity, open hands, cold limbs and profuse sweating. In severe cases, body sweats with a cold sensation, bowel and bladder incontinence and a limp tongue may be present. The tongue is dark purple with a white, greasy coating. The pulse is deep and delayed or deep and feeble. This pattern often results from exhaustion of Yuan-primordial qi and mental cloudiness.

V003-N00106.definition: Characterized by fever, cough, and panting. Alternatively, tenesmus, urine retention, constipation, cardiac or abdominal colic, a pale face, cold limbs, cold sweats, and faint breathing may be present. The pulse is extremely feeble. Often occurs when excessive pathogenic factors block the interior and anti-pathogenic qi becomes extremely deficient.

V003-N00115.definition: Characterized by a high-grade fever, headache, and mild aversion to wind cold. Alternatively, body ache/heaviness, nasal obstruction, cough, thirst, restlessness, sweating, dark yellow urine, a sore throat and a bitter taste in the mouth may be present. The tongue is red with a yellow coating. The pulse is superficial and rapid. This pattern often occurs when pathogenic factors in febrile conditions enter the qi phase and transform into heat, while pathogenic factors in the Wei-defence phase remain unresolved.

V003-N00128.label: 血热妄行证

V003-N00128.definition: 因邪入血分，迫血妄行，或血热内盛，灼伤血络所致。临床以突然大咳血或呕血、衄血、便血、尿血、产后血崩等，势急量多，血色鲜红或紫暗，或斑疹密布，颜色紫赤，舌质红，舌苔黄，脉弦数，可伴见身热、神昏，狂躁不安，头胀，眩晕，胸胁脘腹疼痛等为特征的证候。

V003-N00128.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候

V003-N00128.definition: 因温热邪毒深入血分，迫血妄行所致。临床以温热外感病过程中出现咳血或吐血、衄血、尿血、便血，斑疹密布，色紫或黑，舌质深绛或起刺，脉数，伴见身热、口渴，心烦、不寐等为特征的证候。

V003-N00128.definition: Characterized by haemorrhagic symptoms such as haemoptysis, nosebleed, bloody urine and bloody stools. Alternatively, a high-grade fever, unconsciousness and twitching of hands/feet may be present. The tongue is dark purple. This pattern often occurs when fire/heat consumes Ying nutrients and blood.

V003-N00128.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00128.label: 血分证
V003-N00128.aliases: 血热内扰证； 热炽血分证； 血热证； 热炽血分； 血热内扰； 温邪侵袭血分证
V003-N00128.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of blood phase; Xuefen Syndrome; blood aspect pattern/ syndrome; Blood phase patterns; Blood phase pattern
V003-N00128.pinyinNames: xue fen zheng; xuè fèn zhèng
V003-N00128.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00128.definition: Characterized by fever that aggravates at night, restlessness, insomnia, unconsciousness, delirium, a dark purple tongue and a wiry, rapid pulse. Alternatively, dark purple maculae, haematemesis, nosebleed, bloody stools, bloody urine, a dry tongue with a scanty coating and a thready, deficient pulse may be present. This pattern often occurs when heat in febrile conditions moves blood, stirs wind and consumes yin.

V003-N00128.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00128.label: 血热证
V003-N00128.englishNames: Blood heat pattern; blood heat pattern/ syndrome; syndrome/pattern of blood heat
V003-N00128.pinyinNames: xue re zheng; xuè rè zhèng
V003-N00128.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00128.definition: Characterized by haemoptysis, haematemesis, nosebleed, bloody urine, bloody stools with a bright red, sticky colour, and earlier period with heavy menstruation. Alternatively, red, swollen and painful sores/boils, restlessness, thirst, and fever may be present. The tongue is deep red. The pulse is slippery and rapid. Often occurs when exuberant fire heat in the zang–fu organs causes the blood to flow recklessly.

V003-N00303.definition: Characterized by fever that aggravates at night, restlessness, insomnia, unconsciousness, delirium, a dark purple tongue and a wiry, rapid pulse. Alternatively, dark purple maculae, haematemesis, nosebleed, bloody stools, bloody urine, a dry tongue with a scanty coating and a thready, deficient pulse may be present. This pattern often occurs when heat in febrile conditions moves blood, stirs wind and consumes yin.

V003-N00288.definition: Characterized by haemoptysis, haematemesis, nosebleed, bloody urine, bloody stools with a bright red, sticky colour, and earlier period with heavy menstruation. Alternatively, red, swollen and painful sores/boils, restlessness, thirst, and fever may be present. The tongue is deep red. The pulse is slippery and rapid. Often occurs when exuberant fire heat in the zang–fu organs causes the blood to flow recklessly.

V003-N00138.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V003-N00138.label: 疹回期
V003-N00138.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜期度类术语｜期类
V003-N00138.definition: 泛指岀疹性疾病的恢复阶段，一般病情较轻，以皮疹出齐，按疹发顺序，渐次消退，疹退后岀现糠状脱屑，并留有棕色斑痕，2周左右消失，发热渐退，食欲渐增，咳嗽减轻，精神好转，舌质嫩红少津，舌苔少，脉细数，指纹淡红等为特征。

V003-N00138.label: 出疹期
V003-N00138.path: 临床术语｜分期与传变｜分期
V003-N00138.definition: 泛指出疹性疾病的出疹阶段，一般病情较重，疹点显露，有顺症与逆症的不同。

V003-N00153.label: 出疹期

V003-N00153.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜期度类术语｜期类
V003-N00153.definition: 泛指出疹性疾病的出疹阶段，病情较重，以疹点显露，一般自上而下分批出疹，皮疹稠密，可融成片等为特征，有顺证与逆证的不同。

V003-N00153.definition: 泛指出疹性疾病的后期阶段，一般病情减轻，以疹点出齐后逐渐收没，或有脱屑、色素斑等为特征。

V003-N00151.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜期度类术语｜期类

V003-N00162.definition: 气机阻滞，运行不畅，以胸胁、脘腹胀闷疼痛，时轻时重，时作时休，或走窜不定，胀痛可随暖气、肠鸣、矢气而减，脉弦等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00171.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by edema of limbs, oliguria, heaviness feeling of the head and body, distension, oppression and scurry pain in the chest, epigastrium and abdomen, pale tongue with white slippery coating and string-like relaxed pulse

V003-N00172.label: 气滞湿阻证
V003-N00172.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi stagnation and dampness obstruction
V003-N00172.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气机失调证｜气滞证｜气滞兼夹证

V003-N00172.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00172.definition: Characterized by distension, tightness and migratory pain in the chest, subcostal region and abdomen, nausea, vomiting, body heaviness, dizziness and drowsiness. Oedema may also be present. The tongue coating is white and greasy. The pulse is wiry and slippery, or soft and delayed. Often results from qi stagnation coupled with internal retention of turbid dampness.

V003-N00172.label: 气滞湿阻证
V003-N00172.englishNames: syndrome of blockade of dampness due to qi stagnation
V003-N00172.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V003-N00172.definition: 气机郁滞，湿浊内阻，以胸胁脘腹胀闷窜痛，恶心欲吐，肢体困重，头晕嗜睡，或有浮肿，苔白腻，脉弦滑或濡缓等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00172.label: 气滞湿阻证

V003-N00172.definition: 气机郁滞，湿浊内阻，以胸胁脘腹闷窜痛，恶心欲吐，肢体困重，头晕嗜睡，或有浮肿，苔白腻，脉弦滑或濡缓等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00173.label: 气滞热壅证

V003-N00173.definition: Characterized by depression, restlessness, irritability, distension, tightness and burning pain in the subcostal region, and a dry, bitter mouth. The tongue is red with a yellow coating. The pulse is wiry and rapid. Often occurs when qi stagnation transforms into fire.

V003-N00173.label: 气滞热壅证

V003-N00173.definition: 气机阻滞，日久化火，以情绪抑郁，烦躁易怒，胸胁胀闷、灼痛，口苦口干，舌红苔黄，脉弦数等为常见的证候。

V003-N00174.label: 气滞痰凝证

V003-N00174.definition: 因痰气互结，气逆上冲所致。临床以呃逆连声，胸膈不利，或咽喉有如痰梗，咳咯不出、吞咽不下，平时痰多而黏，舌苔薄腻，脉弦滑，可伴见头昏、目眩等为特征的证候。

V003-N00174.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00174.label: 气滞痰凝证
V003-N00174.aliases: 气郁痰凝证； 气滞郁痰阻证； 气滞痰阻证； 气郁痰阻证

V003-N00174.definition: Characterized by distension, tightness and migratory pain in the chest, subcostal region, and abdomen. Alternatively, masses, skin hardness/numbness, depression and white phlegm may be present. The tongue coating is white and greasy. The pulse is wiry and slippery. Often results from qi stagnation coupled with internal retention of turbid phlegm.

V003-N00174.label: 气滞痰凝证
V003-N00174.aliases: 肝郁痰凝证； 气郁痰凝证； 气郁痰阻证； 气滞痰阻证

Often results from qi stagnation coupled with internal retention of turbid phlegm.

V003-N00180.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by sudden appearance of profuse sweating, somber pale complexion, cyanotic lips, cold extremities, feeble breathing, even fainting or loss of consciousness with incontinence of urine, pale tongue and hardly perceptible pulse

V003-N00201.definition: 因外感或内伤等原因，致使真气急骤外泄所致。临床以突然面色苍白，口唇青紫，汗出，肢冷，呼吸微弱，舌质淡，脉细数等为特征的证候。

V003-N00201.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00201.definition: Characterized by a sudden pale complexion, cyanotic lips, sweating, cold limbs and faint breathing. The tongue is pale. The pulse is thready and rapid. Often results from sudden and rapid leaking of qi.

V003-N00201.label: 气脱证
V003-N00201.aliases: 元气衰败证； 元气虚脱证
V003-N00201.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜气病
V003-N00201.definition: 真气因某种原因而急聚外泄，以突然面色苍白，口唇青紫，汗出肢冷，呼 吸微弱，舌淡脉细数为常见症的危重证候。

V003-N00182.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00182.label: 气随血脱证
V003-N00182.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi collapse following blood loss; pattern/syndrome of qi collapse following bleeding; Blood loss-induced qi collapse pattern
V003-N00182.pinyinNames: qi sui xue tuo zheng; qì suí xuè tuō zhèng
V003-N00182.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00182.definition: Characterized by a pale complexion, cold limbs, profuse sweating, and weak breathing. In severe cases, fainting may be present. The pulse is extremely feeble, or deficient and large. Often occurs when heavy blood loss causes qi to collapse.

V003-N00182.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V003-N00182.label: 气随血脱证
V003-N00182.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi collapse following bleeding
V003-N00182.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜辨证

V003-N00182.label: 气随血脱证
V003-N00182.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi collapse following bleeding
V003-N00182.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜虚实证候｜虚证｜气血两虚证
V003-N00182.definition: 因大量出血，气无所附而随之暴脱，以面色苍白，四肢厥冷，大汗淋漓，气息微弱，甚至昏厥，脉微欲绝，或虚大无力等为常见症的危重证候。

V003-N00182.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V003-N00182.label: 气随血脱证
V003-N00182.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of qi collapse following bleeding
V003-N00182.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜气血辨证类
V003-N00182.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by pale complexion, reverse cold of limbs, profuse sweating, feeble breathing, or even respiratory arrest, and hardly perceptible pulse or vacuous rootless large pulse

V003-N00183.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00183.label: 气逆证
V003-N00183.aliases: 气机上逆证； 气机横逆证
V003-N00183.englishNames: Qi uprising pattern; Qi counterflow pattern; qi counterflow pattern/syndrome; syndrome/pattern of qi counterflow
V003-N00183.pinyinNames: qì nì zhèng; qi ni zheng
V003-N00183.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00183.definition: Characterized by dizziness, blurred vision, vomiting, belching, hiccups, and acid reflux. In severe cases, sudden fainting or panting may be present. Often results from counterflow of qi or disordered qi activity.

V003-N00183.label: 气逆证

V003-N00183.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V003-N00183.definition: 气机升降失常，逆乱向上所致的证候，因脏腑逆气不同，表现可各不相同。

V003-N00183.label: 气逆证
V003-N00183.englishNames: syndrome of reversed flow of qi
V003-N00183.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜气病
V003-N00183.definition: 泛指气机逆乱向上，以咳嗽气喘，或恶心、呕吐、呃逆、嗳气，或觉气从少腹上冲胸咽，胸胁胀闷，头胀眩晕等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00183.definition: a pattern/syndrome arising when qi moves abnormally upward, manifested by cough and dyspnea, or nausea, vomiting, hiccup, belching or even hematemesis, or feeling of gas ascending from the lesser abdomen to the chest or throat with distension and oppr

V003-N00184.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V003-N00184.label: 气机壅闭证
V003-N00184.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气机失调证｜气闭证
V003-N00184.definition: 因气机不畅，或气郁不散，升降失常，阻滞壅闭所致。临床以突发胸脘胁腹痞闷，胀痛，甚则绞痛，或呃逆不止，无肠鸣、矢气，二便不利，脉沉弦或伏等为特征的证候。

V003-N00184.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V003-N00184.label: 气机闭塞证
V003-N00184.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气机失调证｜气闭证
V003-N00184.definition: 因突发精神刺激，气机闭塞不通所致。临床以突然晕厥，牙关紧闭，瞳神游移，肢体强直，脉沉弦或伏等为特征的证候。

V003-N00184.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00184.label: 气闭证
V003-N00184.aliases: 气机壅闭证； 气机闭塞证
V003-N00184.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi block; Qi blockage pattern; qi block pattern/ syndrome
V003-N00184.pinyinNames: qi bi zheng; qì bì zhèng
V003-N00184.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00184.definition: Characterized by colic or paroxysmal abdominal pain, absence of bowel sounds or flatus, and obstruction of the bladder and bowel movements. Alternatively, sudden fainting, trismus and limb rigidity may be present. Often results from blockage of qi activity.

V003-N00184.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V003-N00184.label: 气闭证
V003-N00184.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜辨证

V003-N00184.label: 气闭证

V003-N00184.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V003-N00184.definition: 气机闭塞不通，以突然昏厥，牙关紧闭，肢体强直，或胸腹绞痛，或走窜剧痛，无肠鸣矢气，二便不通，脉沉弦或伏等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00189.definition: 气虚无力升举，应升反降，以头晕眼花，少气倦怠，脘腹坠胀，脱肛，内脏、子宫下垂，舌淡苔白，脉弱等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00190.label: 中气下陷证
V003-N00190.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of middle qi sinking; sunken middle qi pattern/syndrome
V003-N00190.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气虚证｜中气亏虚证
V003-N00190.definition: 因中气亏损，清阳不升，反而陷下所致。临床以小腹坠胀，尿频滴沥，甚则遗尿、失禁，或久泻不止，肛门重坠、脱肛，或阴挺，舌质淡，舌苔薄白，脉缓细，伴见脘腹坠胀，神疲、乏力，头晕、食少等为特征的证候。

V003-N00190.label: 脾气下陷证
V003-N00190.aliases: 脾虚气陷证； 中气下陷证

V003-N00190.path: ICD-11中文-传统医学部分｜传统医学证候｜脏腑证｜脾系证类

V003-N00190.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00190.label: 脾气下陷证
V003-N00190.aliases: 脾虚气陷证； 中气下陷证； Spleen qi sinking pattern； Middle qi sinking pattern； Qi sinking of the middle jiao
V003-N00190.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi collapse due to spleen deficiency; Spleen qi sinking pattern
V003-N00190.pinyinNames: pi qi xia xian zheng; pí qì xià xiàn zhèng
V003-N00190.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00190.definition: Characterized by a bearing-down sensation in the abdomen that aggravates after eating food. Frequent urges to defaecate with a bearing-down sensation of the anus, persistent diarrhoea, rectal prolapse, prolapsed uterus or cloudy urine may be present. Associated symptoms may include shortness of breath, fatigue, lassitude, reluctance to talk, dizziness, blurred vision, a pale, lustreless face, poor appetite and loose stools. The tongue is pale with a white coating. The pulse is delayed and weak. This pattern often develops from severe spleen qi deficiency and occurs when spleen qi fails to ascend.

V003-N00200.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气虚证｜元气不足证

V003-N00202.label: 气虚阳微证
V003-N00202.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi deficiency and yang weakness
V003-N00202.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气虚证｜元气不足证

V003-N00202.label: 脾肾阳虚证
V003-N00202.aliases: 脾肾虚寒证； 脾肾阳衰证； 气虚阳微证
V003-N00202.englishNames: syndrome of yang deficiency of spleen and kidney
V003-N00202.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜脏腑兼证
V003-N00202.definition: 脾肾阳虚，温化无权，虚寒内生，以畏寒肢冷，面色？白，腰酸，腹部冷痛，久泻久痢，或完谷不化，或浮肿尿少，舌淡胖，苔白滑，脉沉迟无力为常见症的证候。

V003-N00203.label: 气虚不摄证
V003-N00203.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi failing to control due to deficiency; pattern/syndrome of qi deficiency with failure to constrain
V003-N00203.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气虚证

V003-N00203.label: 气虚不摄证
V003-N00203.aliases: 气虚不固证； 气虚失摄证
V003-N00203.englishNames: syndrome of qi deficiency with failure to constrain
V003-N00203.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜气病｜气虚证
V003-N00203.definition: 气虚，约束之力不足导致的小便失禁，自汗，出血，遗精，伴有面色无华，神疲乏力，乏力，舌淡胖，脉弱等主要症状的证候。

V003-N00203.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V003-N00203.label: 气虚不摄证
V003-N00203.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of qi deficiency with failure to constrain
V003-N00203.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜气血辨证类
V003-N00203.definition: a pattern/syndrome arising when failure of insufficient qi in constraint leads to loss of liquid substances, marked by seminal emission, incontinence of urine, spontaneous sweating, hemorrhages, lusterless complexion, lassitude, lack of strength, pale

V003-N00204.label: 气不摄津证
V003-N00204.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi failing to control fluid
V003-N00204.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气虚证｜气虚不摄证

V003-N00205.label: 气不摄精证
V003-N00205.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi failing to control essence
V003-N00205.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气虚证｜气虚不摄证

V003-N00206.label: 气不摄血证
V003-N00206.aliases: 气不统血证； 气虚血溢证
V003-N00206.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of qi failing to control the blood; syndrome/pattern of qi failing to control blood
V003-N00206.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气虚证｜气虚不摄证

V003-N00206.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00206.label: 气不摄血证
V003-N00206.aliases: 气不统血证； 气虚血溢证； Qi failing to control blood pattern
V003-N00206.englishNames: Qi failing to hold blood pattern; pattern/syndrome of qi failing to control the blood; syndrome/pattern of qi failing to control blood
V003-N00206.pinyinNames: qi bu she xue zheng; qì bù shè xuè zhèng
V003-N00206.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00206.definition: Characterized by bloody stools, subcutaneous haemorrhage, nosebleed, gum bleed, uterine bleeding, heavy menstruation, lassitude, shortness of breath, reluctance to talk and a lustreless complexion. The tongue is pale. The pulse is weak. Often occurs when qi fails to control blood within the vessels.

V003-N00206.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V003-N00206.label: 气不摄血证
V003-N00206.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi failing to controll blood
V003-N00206.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜辨证

V003-N00206.label: 气不摄血证
V003-N00206.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi failing to controll blood; syndrome of qi failing to control blood
V003-N00206.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V003-N00206.definition: 气虚不能统摄血液，血溢脉外，以便血、齿衄、皮下紫癜，妇女崩漏或月经量多，神疲乏力，气短懒言，面色无华，舌淡，脉弱等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00206.label: 气不摄血证
V003-N00206.aliases: 气不统血证； 气虚血溢证
V003-N00206.englishNames: syndrome of qi failing to control blood
V003-N00206.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜虚实证候｜虚证｜气血两虚证
V003-N00206.definition: 气虚不能统摄血液，以便血、肌衄、齿衄，妇女崩漏、月经量多，神疲乏力，气短懒言，面色无华，舌淡脉弱等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00206.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V003-N00206.label: 气不摄血证
V003-N00206.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of qi failing to control the blood
V003-N00206.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜气血辨证类
V003-N00206.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by hematochezia, bleeding through the pores, gum bleeding, uterine bleeding or excessive menstrual discharge, listlessness, lack of strength, shortness of breath, laziness to speak, lusterless complexion, pale tongue and weak

V003-N00207.label: 气虚兼夹证
V003-N00207.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气虚证

V003-N00208.label: 气虚夹邪证
V003-N00208.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi deficiency mixed with pathogenic factors
V003-N00208.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气虚证｜气虚兼夹证

V003-N00208.label: 气虚夹实证
V003-N00208.englishNames: pattern of qi deficiency complicated with excess
V003-N00208.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜虚实证候｜虚实夹杂证
V003-N00208.definition: 泛指气虚兼夹痰湿、水饮、瘀血等邪的证候。其症除有气虚表现外，并因实邪不同而各具特征。

V003-N00209.label: 气虚发热证
V003-N00209.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi deficiency with fever; qi deficiency fever pattern/syndrome
V003-N00209.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气虚证｜气虚兼夹证｜气虚夹邪证

V003-N00209.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00209.label: 气虚发热证
V003-N00209.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi deficiency with fever; Qi deficiency induced fever pattern; qi deficiency fever pattern/syndrome
V003-N00209.pinyinNames: qi xu fa re zheng; qì xū fā rè zhèng
V003-N00209.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00209.definition: Characterized by a persistent low-grade fever that aggravates upon fatigue, low food intake, fatigue, shortness of breath, and reluctance to talk. The tongue is pale. The pulse is weak. Often results from qi deficiency and floating of yang qi.

V003-N00209.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V003-N00209.label: 气虚发热证
V003-N00209.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi deficiency and fever
V003-N00209.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜辨证

V003-N00209.label: 气虚发热证
V003-N00209.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi deficiency and fever; syndrome of fever due to qi deficiency
V003-N00209.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V003-N00209.definition: 正气亏虚，虚阳浮动，以低热日久，劳累更甚，食少乏力，气短懒言，舌淡脉弱等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00209.label: 气虚发热证
V003-N00209.englishNames: syndrome of fever due to qi deficiency
V003-N00209.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜气病｜气虚证
V003-N00209.definition: 正气亏虚，阳气浮动，以日久低热，劳累更显，食少乏力，气短懒言，舌淡脉虚为常见症的证候。

V003-N00209.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V003-N00209.label: 气虚发热证
V003-N00209.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜气血辨证类
V003-N00209.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by a low persistent fever exaggerated by physical exertion, associated with fatigue, lack of strength, shortness of breath, pale tongue and weak pulse

V003-N00210.label: 气虚寒凝证
V003-N00210.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi deficiency and cold congealment
V003-N00210.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气虚证｜气虚兼夹证｜气虚夹邪证

V003-N00210.label: 气虚寒凝证
V003-N00210.englishNames: syndrome of qi deficiency and coagulated cold
V003-N00210.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜气病｜气虚证
V003-N00210.definition: 气虚血行不畅，寒邪侵袭，以神疲气短，手足不温，肢体麻木冷痛，或挛急不舒，或妇女经行腹痛，经色紫暗，舌淡苔白润等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00211.label: 气虚感冒证
V003-N00211.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of common cold due to qi deficiency
V003-N00211.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气虚证｜气虚兼夹证｜气虚夹邪证

V003-N00211.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00211.label: 气虚外感证
V003-N00211.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of qi deficiency with external contraction; Qi deficiency with external contraction pattern
V003-N00211.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00211.definition: Characterized by aversion to cold, fever, spontaneous sweating, headache, nasal obstruction, a low, weak voice, shortness of breath and lassitude. The pulse is superficial and weak. Often results from constitutional deficiency, insecure Wei-defence and exposure to external pathogenic factors.

V003-N00211.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V003-N00211.label: 气虚外感证
V003-N00211.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi deficiency and external contraction
V003-N00211.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜辨证

V003-N00211.label: 气虚外感证
V003-N00211.englishNames: syndrome of exogenous disease due to qi deficiency; syndrome/pattern of qi deficiency and external contraction
V003-N00211.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V003-N00211.definition: 素体气虚，卫表不固，感受外邪，以恶寒发热，自汗，头痛鼻塞，语声低怯，气短倦怠，脉浮无力为常见症的证候。

V003-N00211.label: 气虚外感证
V003-N00211.englishNames: syndrome of exogenous disease due to qi deficiency
V003-N00211.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜虚实证候｜虚实夹杂证
V003-N00211.definition: 素体气虚，卫表不固，感受外邪，以恶寒发热，自汗，头痛鼻塞，语声低怯，气短倦怠，脉浮无力等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00211.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V003-N00211.label: 气虚外感证
V003-N00211.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of qi deficiency with external contraction
V003-N00211.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜气血辨证类
V003-N00211.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by aversion to cold, fever, spontaneous sweating, headache, stuffy nose, feeble voice, lassitude, lack of strength and shortness of breath

V003-N00212.label: 气虚气滞证
V003-N00212.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi deficiency and stagnation
V003-N00212.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气虚证｜气虚兼夹证｜气虚夹邪证

V003-N00212.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00212.label: 气虚气滞证
V003-N00212.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi deficiency and stagnation; Qi deficiency induced qi stagnation pattern
V003-N00212.pinyinNames: qi xu qi zhi zheng; qì xū qì zhì zhèng
V003-N00212.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00212.definition: Characterized by lassitude, shortness of breath, fatigue, and distension, tightness and migratory pain in the chest or abdomen. The tongue is pale. The pulse is wiry and delayed. Often occurs when qi fails to move and causes qi stagnation.

V003-N00212.label: 气虚气滞证
V003-N00212.englishNames: syndrome of qi deficiency and qi stagnation
V003-N00212.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜气病｜气虚证
V003-N00212.definition: 正气亏虚，运行无力而气机阻滞，以神疲，气短乏力，胸腹胀闷窜痛，舌淡，脉弦缓等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00213.label: 气虚湿阻证
V003-N00213.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of qi deficiency with dampness obstruction; syndrome/pattern of qi deficiency with dampness obstruction
V003-N00213.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气虚证｜气虚兼夹证｜气虚夹邪证

V003-N00213.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V003-N00213.label: 气虚湿困证
V003-N00213.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi deficiency with dampness encumbrance
V003-N00213.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气虚证｜气虚兼夹证｜气虚夹邪证｜气虚湿阻证
V003-N00213.definition: 因气虚夹湿，湿困气机，或脾气素虚，外感挟湿、陷里所致。临床以食少、气短，神疲、乏力，头身沉重，胸闷不舒，或腹胀、腹泻，下痢赤白，舌质淡胖，舌苔腻，脉濡缓或浮，可伴见恶寒、发热，头痛、身痛，无汗等为特征的证候。

V003-N00213.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00213.label: 气虚湿困证
V003-N00213.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi deficiency with dampness encumbrance; Qi deficiency with dampness retention pattern
V003-N00213.pinyinNames: qi xu shi kun zheng; qì xū shī kùn zhèng
V003-N00213.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00213.definition: Characterized by low food intake, fatigue, body heaviness and chest tightness. Abdominal distension and diarrhoea may also be present. The tongue is enlarged with a greasy coating. The pulse is soft. Often results from qi deficiency coupled with dampness retention.

V003-N00213.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V003-N00213.label: 气虚湿阻证
V003-N00213.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi deficiency and dampness obstruction
V003-N00213.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜辨证

V003-N00213.label: 气虚湿困证
V003-N00213.englishNames: Stagnation of Wetness-evildue due to QI Deficiency Syndrome
V003-N00213.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜气病｜气虚证
V003-N00213.definition: 正气亏虚，湿邪困阻，以食少气短，神疲困倦，头身沉重，或腹胀腹泻等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00213.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V003-N00213.label: 气虚湿阻证
V003-N00213.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of qi deficiency with dampness obstruction
V003-N00213.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜气血辨证类
V003-N00213.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by listlessness, lassitude, reduced food intake, shortness of breath, heaviness feeling of the head and body, abdominal distension, diarrhea and soggy weak pulse

V003-N00214.label: 气虚湿阻证
V003-N00214.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of qi deficiency with dampness obstruction; syndrome/pattern of qi deficiency with dampness obstruction
V003-N00214.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气虚证｜气虚兼夹证｜气虚夹邪证

V003-N00214.label: 气虚湿困证
V003-N00214.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气虚证｜气虚兼夹证｜气虚夹邪证｜气虚湿阻证

V003-N00214.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V003-N00214.label: 气虚湿阻证
V003-N00214.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of qi deficiency with dampness obstruction; syndrome/pattern of qi deficiency with dampness obstruction
V003-N00214.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气虚证｜气虚兼夹证｜气虚夹邪证
V003-N00214.definition: 因气虚夹湿，湿流于下，阻滞脉络所致。临床以患肢肿胀或痛，青筋迂曲，或下肢肿胀日久，朝轻暮重，活动后加重，休息抬高下肢后减轻，皮色略暗，舌质淡，边有齿痕，舌苔薄白，脉沉细或涩，伴见患肢麻木，倦怠、乏力等为特征的证候。

V003-N00214.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00214.label: 气虚湿困证
V003-N00214.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi deficiency with dampness encumbrance; Qi deficiency with dampness retention pattern
V003-N00214.pinyinNames: qi xu shi kun zheng; qì xū shī kùn zhèng
V003-N00214.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00214.definition: Characterized by low food intake, fatigue, body heaviness and chest tightness. Abdominal distension and diarrhoea may also be present. The tongue is enlarged with a greasy coating. The pulse is soft. Often results from qi deficiency coupled with dampness retention.

V003-N00214.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准

V003-N00214.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜辨证

V003-N00214.label: 气虚湿困证
V003-N00214.englishNames: Stagnation of Wetness-evildue due to QI Deficiency Syndrome
V003-N00214.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜气病｜气虚证
V003-N00214.definition: 正气亏虚，湿邪困阻，以食少气短，神疲困倦，头身沉重，或腹胀腹泻等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00214.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by listlessness, lassitude, reduced food intake, shortness of breath, heaviness feeling of the head and body, abdominal distension, diarrhea and soggy weak pulse

V003-N00215.label: 气虚痰结证
V003-N00215.aliases: 气虚痰阻证； 气虚痰滞证
V003-N00215.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi deficiency with phlegm binding
V003-N00215.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气虚证｜气虚兼夹证｜气虚夹邪证

V003-N00215.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00215.label: 气虚痰结证
V003-N00215.aliases: 气虚痰阻证； 气虚痰滞证
V003-N00215.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi deficiency with phlegm binding; Qi deficiency with phlegm retention pattern
V003-N00215.pinyinNames: qi xu tan jie zheng; qì xū tán jié zhèng
V003-N00215.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00215.definition: Characterized by shortness of breath, fatigue, cough with phlegm, mental confusion, and skin numbness. The tongue coating is greasy. The pulse is slippery. Alternatively, goiter or scrofula may be present. Often results from qi deficiency coupled with internal retention of turbid phlegm.

V003-N00215.label: 气虚痰结证
V003-N00215.englishNames: The Stagnancy of Phlegm Couse of Deficiency of Qi Syndrome
V003-N00215.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜气病｜气虚证
V003-N00215.definition: 气虚而痰浊留结脏腑形体，以气短乏力，咳喘咯痰，神识昏蒙错乱，肌肤不仁，瘿瘤瘰疬，苔腻脉滑等为常见症的各种证候。

V003-N00217.definition: 正气亏虚而又有余热留滞，以低热不退，或夜热早凉，心烦懊恼，神疲体瘦，气短自汗，食欲不振，舌红苔薄黄，脉细数无力等为常见症的证侯。

V003-N00218.label: 气虚毒恋证

V003-N00218.definition: 泛指气虚而有火毒、热毒、湿毒、虫毒等毒邪留滞的证侯。除有神疲乏力，气短懒言，舌淡脉弱等气虚见证外，由于留滞的毒邪不同而又兼有各自的特征。

V003-N00254.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi and yin depletion
V003-N00254.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气阴两虚证
V003-N00254.definition: 因外感或内伤久病，致使气阴不足或亏损所致。临床以神疲、乏力，气短、懒言，稍动则心慌、心悸、汗出，伴见咽干、口燥，潮热、盗汗，小便短少，大便干结，舌质嫩红，舌边有齿痕，舌苔少而干，脉细无力或虚数等为特征的证候。

V003-N00254.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00254.label: 气阴两虚证
V003-N00254.aliases: 气阴亏虚证； 气阴两亏证； Insufficiency of qi and yin pattern
V003-N00254.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of dual deficiency of qi and yin; syndrome/pattern of qi and yin deficiency; Qi and yin deficiency pattern
V003-N00254.pinyinNames: qi yin liang xu zheng; qì yīn liǎng xū zhèng
V003-N00254.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00254.definition: Characterized by lassitude, shortness of breath, reluctance to talk, a dry mouth and throat, tidal fever, spontaneous sweating, night sweats, scanty urine, and constipation. The tongue is red or enlarged with a dry, scanty coating. The pulse is thready, weak or deficient and rapid. Often results from qi deficiency coupled with consumption of yin fluids.

V003-N00269.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V003-N00269.definition: 津液亏损，脏腑组织失却濡养，以口燥咽干，唇焦或裂，渴欲饮水，小便短少，大便于结，舌红少津，脉细数无力等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00269.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by dry mouth and throat, parched or cracked lips, thirst with desire for drink, oliguria, constipation, reddened tongue lacking moisture, and rapid fine weak pulse

V003-N00272.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V003-N00272.label: 液脱证
V003-N00272.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of humor collapse; humor collapse pattern/syndrome
V003-N00272.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜津液证类｜津液亏虚证
V003-N00272.definition: 因津液极度耗损所致。临床以形体羸痩，口唇焦裂，目陷、螺瘪，皮肤枯瘪，或肌肤甲错，关节僵硬，屈伸不利，小便少或闭，大便燥结，舌质红绛、瘦瘪，舌苔无津，脉细弱或虚数，或伴见眩晕、耳鸣，头脑空痛，两胫酸软等为特征的证候。

V003-N00272.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00272.label: 液脱证
V003-N00272.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of humor collapse; humor collapse pattern/syndrome; Fluids loss pattern
V003-N00272.pinyinNames: ye tuo zheng; yè tuō zhèng
V003-N00272.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00272.definition: Characterized by weight loss, dry, cracked lips, dry, withered skin, sunken eyes, impaired joint movement, scanty urination and constipation. The tongue is dry. The pulse is thready and weak. Often results from a severe deficiency of bodily fluids.

V003-N00272.definition: 津液亏虚之甚者，以形体消瘦，口唇焦裂，皮肤枯瘪，眼眶凹陷，关节不利，小便短少，大便干结等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00272.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V003-N00272.label: 液脱证
V003-N00272.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜津液辨证类
V003-N00272.definition: a severe case of fluid deficiency pattern/syndrome, marked by parched or cracked lips, withered skin, sunken eyes, tinnitus, oliguria and dry fecal binding, reddened tongue with no moisture and fine weak pulse

V003-N00275.label: 精气亏虚证

V003-N00275.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of essence and qi depletion; essential qi deficiency pattern/syndrome
V003-N00275.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜精髓证类｜精亏证
V003-N00275.definition: 因先天禀赋不足，或久病虚损，精气亏少所致。临床以头晕，脑鸣，形体消瘦，身材矮小，动作迟钝，智力低下，或男子精少、精稀，阳痿、不育，或女子闭经、不孕等为特征的证候。

V003-N00275.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00275.label: 精气亏虚证
V003-N00275.aliases: 精气不足证； 精虚气弱证； 精亏气虚证； 精亏证； Essence deficiency pattern； Essential qi insufficiency

V003-N00275.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00275.definition: Characterized by weight loss, dizziness, tinnitus cranii, short stature, slow movements and mental retardation. Alternatively, low sperm count, impotence or premature ejaculation may be present. Often results from essential qi deficiency.

V003-N00275.label: 精气亏虚证
V003-N00275.aliases: 精亏证； 精气不足证
V003-N00275.englishNames: syndrome of deficiency of vital essence

V003-N00275.definition: 精气亏少，以形体消瘦，头晕脑鸣，身材矮小，动作迟钝，智力低下，或精少精稀，阳痿早泄等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00275.definition: a pattern/syndrome arising from deficiency of essential qi, marked by emaciation, dizziness, tinnitus, short and slight of stature, slow in movements, low intelligence, or by infertility, sterility, impotence and premature ejaculation

V003-N00279.definition: Characterized by dizziness, tinnitus, headache with a hollow sensation, low back soreness/weakness, slow movements, limb flaccidity. Often occurs when essence and marrow fail to nourish the body.

V003-N00279.label: 髓亏证
V003-N00279.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证

V003-N00285.definition: 因寒客血脉，凝滞气机，血行不畅所致。临床以肢体麻木冷痛，局部紫暗、发凉，手足清冷，喜暖、恶寒，得温痛减，或少腹疼痛，月经衍期，痛经，经色紫暗，夹有血块，唇色青紫，舌质暗淡，舌苔白，脉沉迟涩等为特征的证候。

V003-N00285.definition: Characterized by pain in the hands/feet with a dark purple colour and cold sensation, the pain alleviates with warmth and aggravates with cold. Alternatively, lower abdominal pain, cold limbs and delayed period with a dark purple menstrual colour and clots may be present. The tongue is pale dark with a white coating. The pulse is deep, slow and hesitant. Often occurs when cold causes the qi and blood to stagnate.

V003-N00304.definition: 血分热盛，扰乱神明，以心悸心烦，躁扰不宁，或有谵语，身热夜甚，渴不多饮，斑疹显露，舌色深绛、少津少苔，脉细数等为常见症的证候。

The tongue is purple or with ecchymosis. The pulse is wiry and hesitant. Often occurs when stagnant blood obstructs the circulation of blood.

The tongue is purple or with ecchymosis. The pulse is wiry and hesitant. Often occurs when stagnant blood obstructs the circulation of blood.

V003-N00316.definition: Characterized by bleeding of dark purple blood with clots, localized stabbing pain with a fixed position or bluish lumps. The tongue is purple or with ecchymosis. The pulse is hesitant. Often occurs when stagnant blood causes the blood to flow out of the vessels.

V003-N00316.label: 血瘀动血证

V003-N00317.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of stasis and stagnation transforming into fire; syndrome/pattern of stasis and stagnation transforming into heat

V003-N00317.definition: 因瘀血凝滞，壅阻气血化热所致。临床以右下腹疼痛、拒按，腹皮板滞，压痛、反跳痛明显，或可触及包块，或产后小腹胀急、疼痛，小便不通或短涩，舌质红，舌苔黄，脉弦滑数，可伴见发热，口渴或口干、不欲饮，大便秘结等为特征的证候。

V003-N00317.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00317.label: 血瘀化热证
V003-N00317.aliases: 瘀血化热证； 血瘀化火证； 瘀热内郁证； 瘀滞化热证； Stasis transforming into heat pattern

V003-N00317.definition: Characterized by stabbing pain with a burning sensation, bluish lumps, afternoon or night fever, and a dry mouth with no desire to drink water. The tongue is dark red or with ecchymosis. The pulse is hesitant and rapid. Often occurs when prolonged blood stasis transforms into heat.

V003-N00317.label: 血瘀化热证
V003-N00317.aliases: 血瘀发热证； 瘀毒内阻证； 瘀热内郁证； 瘀热壅阻证； 瘀滞化热证

V003-N00317.definition: 血瘀日久化热，以局部刺痛、灼热，或有青紫肿块，午后或夜间发热，口干漱水不欲咽，舌暗红或有斑点，脉涩而数等为常见症的证候。

Alternatively, bluish, diffuse swelling and distending pain may be present. The tongue is pale purple or with ecchymosis. The pulse is hesitant. Often occurs when stagnant blood causes water retention.

V003-N00320.definition: 因痰瘀搏结，脉络痹阻所致。临床以局部肿块、包块刺痛，或肢体麻木、痿废，颜面胸背等处泛发黑白粉刺，舌质暗红或紫，或有瘀点、瘀斑，舌苔腻，脉弦滑或涩，可伴见胸膈或乳房疼痛，咳唾痰血，腹胀，经行腹痛，经血色紫黑，婚久不孕等为特征的证候。

V003-N00320.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00320.label: 痰瘀互结证
V003-N00320.aliases: 痰瘀内阻证； 瘀痰内阻证； 瘀痰互阻证； 血瘀痰凝证； 痰瘀搏结证
V003-N00320.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of phlegm and stasis obstructing the internal; Intertwined phlegm and blood stasis pattern
V003-N00320.pinyinNames: tan yu hu jie zheng; tán yū hù jié zhèng
V003-N00320.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00320.definition: Characterized by local lumps with stabbing pain, limb numbness or flaccidity, chest tightness, and profuse phlegm that may contain dark purple clots. The tongue is dark purple or with ecchymosis and a greasy coating. The pulse is wiry and hesitant. Often occurs when turbid phlegm intertwines with stagnant blood.

V003-N00320.label: 痰瘀互结证
V003-N00320.aliases: 痰瘀痹阻证； 痰瘀搏结证； 痰瘀阻窍证； 血瘀痰凝证； 瘀痰内阻证

V003-N01028.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of combat and binding of phlegm and stasis

V003-N01028.label: 血瘀痰滞证
V003-N01028.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of blood stasis with phlegm stagnation
V003-N01028.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血瘀证｜血瘀兼夹证
V003-N01028.definition: 因肝脾郁结，或冲任失调，血瘀痰凝互结所致。临床以局部触及较大肿块，质地圆滑，推之可移，或坚实木硬，重坠不适，舌质暗红，舌苔薄腻，脉弦滑或涩，可伴见胸胁牵痛，烦闷急躁，月经不调，痛经等为特征的证候。

The tongue is dark purple or with ecchymosis and a greasy coating. The pulse is wiry and hesitant. Often occurs when turbid phlegm intertwines with stagnant blood.

V003-N00322.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血瘀证｜血瘀兼夹证

V003-N00322.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of blood stasis and wind-dryness
V003-N00322.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜辨证

V003-N00322.label: 血瘀风燥证
V003-N00322.englishNames: pattern of blood stasis and wind-dryness
V003-N00322.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜血病｜血瘀证
V003-N00322.definition: 瘀血内阻，新血不生，化燥生风，以肌肤甲错，皮肤干涩脱屑、瘙痒，或眩晕，肢体麻木，舌紫暗或有斑点，脉细涩等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00322.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准

V003-N00322.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of blood stasis with wind-dryness
V003-N00322.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜病因辨证类
V003-N00322.definition: a pattern/syndrome arising when internally retained static blood gives rise to dryness and wind, and manifested by encrusted skin, desquamation and itching, associated with vertigo, numbness of the limb, purplish tongue or appearance of purple spots o

V003-N00323.label: 血败肉腐证

V003-N00324.label: 血虚证
V003-N00324.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of blood deficiency; Blood deficiency pattern; blood deficiency pattern/syndrome

V003-N00324.label: 血虚证
V003-N00324.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of blood deficiency; Blood deficiency pattern; blood deficiency pattern/syndrome
V003-N00324.path: ICD-11中文-传统医学部分｜传统医学证候｜气血津液证｜血证

V003-N00324.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00324.label: 血虚证
V003-N00324.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of blood deficiency; Blood deficiency pattern; blood deficiency pattern/syndrome
V003-N00324.pinyinNames: xue xu zheng; xuè xū zhèng
V003-N00324.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00324.definition: Characterized by a pale or sallow complexion, pale lips, tongue and fingernails, dizziness, blurred vision, palpitations, dream-disturbed sleep, hands/feet numbness, scanty menstruation with a pale menstrual colour, and delayed period or amenorrhea. The pulse is thready. Often occurs when blood fails to nourish the zang–fu organs, meridians and other body tissues.

V003-N00324.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V003-N00324.label: 血虚证
V003-N00324.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜辨证

V003-N00324.label: 血虚证
V003-N00324.englishNames: blood deficiency syndrome/pattern; syndrome of blood deficiency
V003-N00324.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V003-N00324.definition: 血液亏虚，失于荣养，以面色淡白或萎黄，唇、甲淡白，头晕眼花，心悸多梦，手足发麻，妇女经少经闭，舌淡，脉细等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00324.label: 血虚证
V003-N00324.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜血病
V003-N00324.definition: 血液亏虚，脏腑、经络、形体失养，以面色淡白或萎黄，唇舌爪甲色淡，头晕眼花，心悸多梦，手足发麻，妇女月经量少、色淡、衍期或经闭，脉细等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00324.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V003-N00324.label: 血虚证
V003-N00324.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜气血辨证类
V003-N00324.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by pale or sallow complexion, pale lips and nails, dizziness, dimmed vision, palpitations, numbness of extremities and fine pulse

V003-N00325.label: 亡血证
V003-N00325.aliases: 血脱证； 血脉损伤证
V003-N00325.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血虚证

V003-N00325.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00325.label: 血脱证
V003-N00325.englishNames: Blood collapse pattern; blood collapse pattern/syndrome
V003-N00325.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00325.definition: Characterized by a pale face, dizziness, blurred vision, mild to severe palpitations, shortness of breath, and cold limbs. The tongue is pale. The pulse feels like a scallion stalk. Often results from sudden or chronic blood loss.

V003-N00325.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V003-N00325.label: 血脱证
V003-N00325.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜辨证

V003-N00325.label: 血脱证
V003-N00325.englishNames: blood collapse syndrome/pattern; syndrome of blood depletion
V003-N00325.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V003-N00325.definition: 突然大量失血，或长期反复出血，致血脉空虚，脏腑组织失养，以面色苍白，头晕目眩，心悸怔忡，气微而短，四肢厥冷，渐致神志昏蒙，舌淡白，脉芤，或微细欲绝等为常见症的危重证候。

V003-N00325.label: 血脱证
V003-N00325.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜血病
V003-N00325.definition: 突然大量出血或长期反复出血,血液亡脱于外,以面色苍白,头晕眼花,心悸怔忡,气微而短,四肢清冷,舌淡脉芤等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00325.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V003-N00325.label: 血脱证
V003-N00325.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜气血辨证类
V003-N00325.definition: a critical pattern/syndrome occurring in cases of acute massive bleeding, marked by pallor, dizziness, palpitations, faint and short breathing, cold extremities and even mental confusion, pale tongue, hollow pulse or hardly perceptible pulse

V003-N00327.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of stasis stagnation due to blood depletion

V003-N00328.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of meridian closure due to blood depletion

V003-N00329.label: 血虚亏损证
