V003-N01520.aliases: 心阳亏虚证； 心阳气虚证； 心阳不足证
V003-N01520.englishNames: syndrome/pattern heart yang deficiency; syndrome/ pattern heart yang deficiency; Heart yang deficiency pattern; heart yang deficiency pattern/syndrome
V003-N01520.pinyinNames: xin yang xu zheng; xin yin xu zheng; xīn yáng xū zhèng
V003-N01520.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N01520.definition: Characterized by mild to severe palpitations, chest tightness, cold intolerance, cold limbs, a bright pale face, shortness of breath, and spontaneous sweating. Oedema in the leg and dark lips may also be present. The tongue is purple with a white, slippery coating. The pulse is weak or regularly/irregularly intermittent. This pattern can be a further progression of heart qi deficiency. It may also occur when heart yang fails to warm the body.

V003-N01520.label: 心阳虚证
V003-N01520.aliases: 心阳不足证； 心阳亏虚证； 心阳虚衰证
V003-N01520.englishNames: syndrome of deficiency of heart yang
V003-N01520.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜阴阳证候｜阳虚证
V003-N01520.definition: 心阳虚衰，温运失司，以心悸怔忡、心胸憋闷而喘、畏冷肢凉、面色？白、或下肢浮肿、唇舌色暗、苔白、脉弱或结代等为常见症的证候。

V003-N01520.definition: a pattern/syndrome resulting from deficiency of yang qi to warm and activate the heart, usually manifested by palpitation, dyspnea, a feeling of pressure in the chest, aversion to cold with cold limbs, bright pale complexion, dark lips and tongue with

V003-N01521.label: 心阳暴脱证
V003-N01521.aliases: 心阳欲脱证； Heart yang collapse pattern
V003-N01521.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of sudden collapse of heart yang; Heart yang collapse pattern; Sudden collapse of heart yang pattern
V003-N01521.pinyinNames: xin yang bao tuo zheng; xīn yáng bào tuō zhèng
V003-N01521.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N01521.definition: Characterized by cold sweats, cold limbs, faint breathing, mild to severe palpitations, a pale complexion and mental confusion or unconsciousness. The pulse is extremely weak. This pattern can be a further progression of heart yang deficiency. It may also occur as a result of sudden blockage or attack by excess pathogens.

V003-N01521.label: 心阳暴脱证
V003-N01521.englishNames: syndrome of sudden collapse of heart yang
V003-N01521.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V003-N01521.definition: 心阳衰败而欲脱，以突然冷汗淋漓，四肢厥冷，呼吸微弱，心悸怔忡，神志模糊、昏迷，面色苍白，脉微欲绝等为常见症的危重征候。

V003-N01521.label: 心阳暴脱证
V003-N01521.englishNames: syndrome of sudden collapse of heart yang
V003-N01521.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜心和小肠证候｜心系证候
V003-N01521.definition: 实邪暴袭、阻滞等，使心阳突然衰败而欲脱，以突然冷汗淋漓，四肢厥冷，呼吸微弱，心悸怔忡，面色苍白，脉微欲绝，神志模糊等为常见症的危重证候。

V003-N01524.definition: 因心阴不足，心失濡养所致。临床以容易激动，心烦、心慌，时作惊悸，少寐、梦多，舌质偏红，脉细或数等心阴虚证轻者为特征的证候。

V003-N01524.definition: Characterized by palpitations, restlessness, insomnia, dream-disturbed sleep, dizziness, forgetfulness, hot flushes and night sweats. The tongue is red with a scanty coating. The pulse is thready and rapid. This pattern often occurs when heart yin fails to nourish the heart and heart spirit.

V003-N01531.definition: 因血行不畅，瘀血阻滞心脉所致。临床以心痹胸痛或刺痛，痛引胸背、臂内，舌质紫暗，或有瘀点、瘀斑，舌苔薄白，脉细涩或结代，伴见心悸、怔忡，心中憺憺大动等为特征的证候。

V003-N01531.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N01531.label: 心脉瘀阻证

V003-N01531.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N01531.definition: Characterized by chest tightness, palpitations, and stabbing cardiac pain that radiates to the shoulder and back. The tongue is dark purple. The pulse is thready and hesitant or regularly/irregularly intermittent. This pattern often occurs when stagnant blood obstructs the heart vessels.

The pulse is thready and hesitant or regularly/irregularly intermittent. This pattern often occurs when stagnant blood obstructs the heart vessels.

V003-N01541.pinyinNames: yu zhuo zu zhi jing shi zheng

V003-N01542.aliases: 瘀阻精室证； 瘀血阻滞精室证； Stasis/stagnant blood obstructing the essence chamber pattern
V003-N01542.englishNames: Stasis obstructing the essence chamber pattern; syndrome/pattern  stasis and obstruction in essence chamber; syndrome/pattern stasis and obstruction in essence chamber
V003-N01542.pinyinNames: jīng shì yū zǔ zhèng; jing shi yu zu zheng
V003-N01542.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N01542.definition: Characterized by stabbing pain in the perineum with a fixed location and tenderness. Alternatively, lumps, low sperm count, impotence or pain during ejaculation may be present. The tongue is dark purple or with ecchymosis. The pulse is wiry and hesitant. This pattern often occurs when stagnant blood affects the essence chamber.

V003-N01542.label: 瘀阻精室证
V003-N01542.aliases: 精室瘀阻证； 瘀血阻滞精室证

V003-N01542.definition: 瘀血阻滞精室，以会阴部固定刺痛、拒按，或有肿块，或精少，或阳痿，或射精刺痛，或为血精，舌紫暗或有斑点，脉弦涩等为常见症的证候。

V003-N01547.definition: Characterized by a stabbing pain in the subcostal region with a burning sensation, and a dry, bitter mouth. The tongue is deep red with a yellow coating. The pulse is hesitant and rapid. This pattern often results from internal build up of heat and liver blood stagnation.

V003-N01547.label: 肝热血瘀证
V003-N01547.englishNames: Blood-stasis in case of Liver-heat Syndrom
V003-N01547.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜血病｜血瘀证
V003-N01547.definition: 邪热内蕴，肝血瘀滞，以两胁刺痛、灼热，口苦口干，舌暗红苔黄，脉涩而数等为常见症的证候。

V003-N01548.label: 肝瘀化热证
V003-N01548.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of liver stasis transforming into heat
V003-N01548.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肝系证类｜肝证类｜肝实证｜肝瘀实证

V003-N01548.label: 肝瘀化热证
V003-N01548.englishNames: Liver qi stagnation transforming into heat pattern; syndrome/pattern of liver stasis transforming into heat
V003-N01548.pinyinNames: gan yu hua re zheng; gān yū huà rè zhèng
V003-N01548.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N01548.definition: Characterized by a burning sensation and stabbing pain/masses in the subcostal region with tenderness, and a dry, bitter mouth. The tongue is dark purple or with ecchymosis, and a yellow coating. The pulse is wiry and hesitant. This pattern often occurs when prolonged liver qi stagnation and liver blood stasis transform into heat.

V003-N01548.label: 肝瘀化热证
V003-N01548.englishNames: syndrome of heat transformed from liver stasis
V003-N01548.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜血病｜血瘀证
V003-N01548.definition: 肝经血瘀，淤久化热，以两胁灼热、刺痛，或胁下有痞块、拒按，口干口苦，舌紫暗或有斑点，苔黄，脉弦涩等为常见症的证候。

V003-N01549.label: 肝瘀痰结证
V003-N01549.englishNames: Liver stagnation with phlegm retention pattern; syndrome/pattern of phlegm binding and blood stasis in liver
V003-N01549.pinyinNames: gan yu tan jie zheng; gān yū tán jié zhèng
V003-N01549.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N01549.definition: Characterized by masses, distending or stabbing pain and tenderness in the subcostal region, along with phlegm in the throat. The tongue is purple or with ecchymosis and a greasy coating. The pulse is wiry and hesitant. This pattern often occurs when stagnant qi and phlegm accumulate in the liver.

V003-N01549.label: 肝瘀痰结证
V003-N01549.englishNames: Syndrome of Phlegm and  Blood Stasis in Liver
V003-N01549.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜肝和胆证候｜肝系证候
V003-N01549.definition: 瘀痰蕴结于肝，以胁下痞块，胀痛或刺痛、拒按，舌紫或有斑点，苔腻，脉弦涩等为常见症的证候。

V003-N01550.definition: Characterized by stabbing pain/masses with a fixed location in the subcostal region, and tenderness. The tongue is dark purple or with ecchymosis. The pulse is wiry and hesitant. This pattern often occurs when blood stasis obstructs the liver collaterals.

V003-N01550.label: 肝经血瘀证
V003-N01550.aliases: 肝血瘀证； 肝血瘀阻证； 肝瘀证； 肝瘀阻证； 瘀滞肝络证

V003-N01551.label: 肝气郁结证
V003-N01551.englishNames: liver qi depression pattern/syndrome; syndrome/pattern of liver qi depression
V003-N01551.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肝系证类｜肝证类｜肝实证｜肝郁证
V003-N01551.definition: 因七情所伤，肝失疏泄，气机郁结所致。临床以情志抑郁，胸胁或少腹胀闷、窜痛，善太息，乳房胀痛，月经不调，舌质淡红，脉弦或弦细有力，关上尤甚，病情随情绪变化而增减等为特征的证候。

V003-N01551.label: 肝郁气滞证
V003-N01551.aliases: 肝郁不舒证； 肝气郁滞证； 肝气郁结证； 肝郁证
V003-N01551.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi stagnation due to liver depression; pattern/syndrome of liver depression and qi stagnation
V003-N01551.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肝系证类｜肝证类｜肝实证｜肝郁证｜肝气郁结证
V003-N01551.definition: 因七情内伤，肝气郁滞所致。临床以情绪低落，闷闷不乐，胸胁或脘腹闷胀，得太息则舒，食欲不振，舌质淡红，舌苔薄白，脉弦等属肝气郁结证之轻者为特征的证候。

V003-N01551.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N01551.definition: Characterized by emotional depression, frequent sighing, distension/tightness/migratory pain in the chest, subcostal region or bilateral lower abdomen, breast distension/pain in women and irregular menstruation. The pulse is wiry. This pattern often occurs when the liver fails to maintain the free flow of qi.

V003-N01604.definition: 因久病入络，肝络瘀滞，肝不藏血，血虚亏耗所致。临床以胸胁、少腹隐痛或刺痛，动辄吐血、咯血、血血、便血或崩漏，血色暗或淡，舌质淡或暗，舌有瘀点、瘀斑，脉细涩无力，伴见头晕、眼花，月经量少或闭经，面色、爪甲苍白等为特征的证候。

V003-N01606.definition: 因久病肝虚，失于疏泄，血瘀凝滞所致。临床以两胁隐痛、刺痛，固定不移，按揉稍舒，或胁下、少腹有肿块，触之硬或痛，头晕、眼花，面目黯黄，形体消瘦，稍劳汗出，懈怠、乏力，舌质淡紫，或有瘀点、瘀斑，脉细涩，或伴见潮热、盗汗，月经量少，经闭不行等为特征的证候。

V003-N01606.label: 肝瘀血虚证
V003-N01606.aliases: 肝虚血瘀证； 血虚肝瘀证

V003-N01605.definition: 肝气虚弱，血行瘀滞，以两胁作胀，偶有刺痛，或胁下有痞块，胸闷喜叹息，舌淡紫，脉弱而涩等为常见症的证候。

V003-N01611.definition: Characterized by dizziness, dry eyes, poor eyesight, limb numbness, dry fingernails and toenails, insomnia, dream-disturbed sleep, scanty menstrual volume with a pale menstrual colour, a pale complexion and lips. In severe cases, amenorrhoea may be present. The tongue is pale. The pulse is thready. This pattern often occurs when blood fails to nourish the liver.

V003-N01640.definition: 因里热炽盛，结于大肠，腑气不通，或燥屎内结而迫津下泄所致。临床以潮热、恶热，烦渴引饮，腹胀硬满，疼痛拒按，大便秘结，或热结旁流，泻下黄臭粪水，舌质红，舌苔焦黄。脉沉实或沉数有力等为特征的证候。

The pulse is deep and rapid. This pattern often occurs when exuberant interior heat blocks the intestinal qi.

V003-N01641.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N01641.definition: Characterized by abdominal distension/pain, sudden, fulminant diarrhoea, diarrhoea with blood, tenesmus, a sensation of incomplete evacuation, sticky, strong-odoured stools, a burning sensation around the anus, fever, thirst, and scanty urine. The tongue is red with a yellow, greasy coating. The pulse is slippery and rapid. This pattern often occurs when internal damp heat obstructs the intestine.

V003-N01644.definition: Characterized by bright red stool, dry stools and itching around the anus. In severe cases, the passing of pure blood may be present. The tongue is red with a yellow coating. The pulse is wiry. This pattern often occurs when wind fire damages the intestinal collaterals, resulting in intestinal bleeding.

V003-N01712.definition: Characterized by a burning distension/pain in the low back, hesitant, painful urination, bloody urine (possibly pyuria), fever, thirst or yellow, sticky vaginal discharge. The tongue is red with a yellow, greasy coating. The pulse is slippery and rapid. This pattern often occurs when damp heat retains in the kidney.

V003-N01714.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N01714.definition: Characterized by low back soreness, back pain, dizziness, insomnia, a poor memory, hearing decline, decreased libido and reproductive function. This pattern often results from congenital deficiency, postnatal over-exertion or chronic diseases.

V003-N01714.label: 肾虚证
V003-N01714.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜肾和膀胱证候｜肾系证候
V003-N01714.definition: 平素短气息促，动则为甚，吸气不利，心慌，脑转耳鸣，腰酸腿软，劳累后喘哮易发。或畏寒，肢冷，自汗，面色苍白，舌苔淡白，质胖嫩，脉沉细；或颧红，烦热，汗出粘手，舌质红少苔，脉细数。可具体为肾的气血阴阳虚弱。

V003-N01715.definition: 因先天不足，精髓不充，或后天失养，肾虚精亏所致。临床以生长发育迟缓，腰酸、骨痿，动作迟缓，或骨折难以愈合，早衰，健忘，或愚笨、痴呆，舌质淡，脉细弱，尺部无力，伴见头晕、眼花，耳鸣、耳聋，毛发稀疏，齿浮松动等为特征的证候。

The pulse is wiry and hesitant. This pattern often results from abdominal injury or occurs when heat affects the urinary bladder, causing blood accumulating in the urinary bladder.

V003-N01766.definition: Characterized by frequent urge to urinate but unable to pass, white urine, lower abdominal tightness and distension, a bearing-down sensation of the anus, body heaviness, lassitude, reluctance to talk and shortness of breath. The tongue is pale and enlarged with a thin, white coating. The pulse is thready, weak or soft. This pattern often occurs when kidney qi fails to secure the urinary bladder.

Amenorrhoea or uterine bleeding may also be present. The tongue is dark purple or with ecchymosis. The pulse is wiry and hesitant. This pattern often occurs when stagnant blood affects the uterus.

Alternatively, thin, clear vaginal discharge, infertility, miscarriage and a pale complexion may be present. The tongue is pale with a white coating. The pulse is deep and weak. This pattern often occurs when yang qi fails to warm the uterus.

Yellow, sticky and smelly vagina discharge may also be present. The tongue is red with a yellow coating. The pulse is rapid. This pattern often occurs when heat accumulates in the uterus.

V003-N01903.definition: 因温热疫毒等侵袭肺胃，或邪热郁发于肺脾所致。临床以午后潮热，心烦、口渴、欲饮，咳嗽、痰黄，胸痛，腹满、便秘，舌质红，舌苔黄或灰黑而燥，脉滑数，指纹紫滞，伴见皮疹分批外发，由头面而渐及躯体、掌跖，疹点由稀疏而稠密，疹色鲜红或渐暗，或唇周热疮、水疱，鼻尖、鼻翼红斑，压之退色等为特征的证候。

V003-N01903.definition: Characterized by fever, thirst, profuse sweating, cough, panting, a burning pain in the stomach, constipation and yellow urine. The tongue is red with a yellow coating. The pulse is slippery and rapid. This pattern often occurs when exuberant heat affects the lung and stomach.

V003-N01906.definition: 因肺胃久病虚损，耗伤阴液，或温热病后期，肺胃阴虚不复所致。临床以口舌咽干，烦渴、喜饮，形体消瘦，毛发枯悴，肌肤甲错，舌质红而干，舌苔少或无，脉细数，伴见干咳、无痰或痰少，咳辄牵掣胸胁疼痛，胃脘嘈杂，善食、易饥，或不饥、不食等为特征的证候。

V003-N01924.label: 胃肠湿热证
V003-N01924.englishNames: Damp heat in the stomach and intestines pattern
V003-N01924.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N01924.definition: Characterized by abdominal masses/distension, vomiting, nausea, a poor appetite, loose stools with a sensation of incomplete evacuation, fever and thirst. Stools containing pus or blood, tenesmus, vomiting and violent diarrhoea may also be present. The tongue is red with a yellow, greasy coating. The pulse is slippery and rapid. This pattern often occurs when damp heat accumulates in the stomach and intestines.

V003-N01924.label: 胃肠湿热证
V003-N01924.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜寒热证候｜热证｜湿热证
V003-N01924.definition: 湿热内蕴，阻滞胃肠，以脘腹痞胀，呕恶纳呆，便溏不爽，或下痢脓血、里急后重，或呕吐、腹泻如注，发热口渴，舌红苔黄腻，脉滑数等为常见症的证候。

V003-N01927.label: 胃肠积热证
V003-N01927.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of heat accumulation in the stomach and intestine
V003-N01927.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜脾脏兼证类｜胃肠兼证
V003-N01927.definition: 因过食煎煿厚味，胃肠积热，灼伤络脉所致。临床以脘腹痞满，或胀痛拒按，大便挟血，色鲜紫或暗红，嘈杂，烦渴，口苦，舌质红，舌苔黄燥。脉滑数或沉实有力，可伴见潮热，烦躁不安，手足心热等为特征的证候。

V003-N01927.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N01927.label: 胃肠实热证
V003-N01927.aliases: 胃肠积热证； Heat accumulating in the stomach and intestines pattern
V003-N01927.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of excess-heat in the stomach and intestine; Excess heat in the stomach and intestines pattern
V003-N01927.pinyinNames: wei chang shi re zheng; wèi cháng shí rè zhèng
V003-N01927.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N01927.definition: Characterized by a high fever or severe feverish sensation in the afternoon, a burning stomach ache that alleviates after eating cool-property food, thirst, sweating, abdominal pain/hardness/distension with tenderness, constipation, strong-odoured stools, and scanty, yellow urine. In severe cases, unconsciousness, delirium, mania and faecal impaction with watery diarrhoea may also be present. The tongue is red with a dry, yellow coating. Alternatively, the tongue may be dark brown with thorns. The pulse is rapid or deep, replete and forceful. This pattern often occurs when exuberant heat accumulates in the stomach and intestines.

V003-N01927.label: 胃肠实热证
V003-N01927.englishNames: Syndrome of Excessive Heat in Stomach and Intestine
V003-N01927.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜脏腑兼证
V003-N01927.definition: 火热炽盛，壅滞胃肠，以胃脘灼痛、喜冷，发热，口渴，口臭，腹胀作痛，大便秘结、腐臭，小便短黄，舌红苔黄，脉数等为常见症的证候。

V003-N01931.definition: 因嗜食辛辣炙煿，或五志怫郁化火，壅滞胃肠所致。临床以胃脘灼痛、渴喜饮冷，腹胀或痛，大便秘结，小便短黄，舌质红，舌苔黄，脉数实有力，或伴见口舌生疮，口臭，唇裂，齿浮、龈肿等为特征的证候。

V003-N01928.definition: Characterized by gastric or abdominal masses/distension/(migratory) pain that alleviates upon belching or flatus. The pulse is wiry. This pattern often occurs when qi of the stomach and intestines becomes stagnant.

V003-N01936.definition: 因秉质气虚，或久病伤损，脾失健运。肺失宣降所致。临床以咳嗽声低，喘促短气，咯痰清稀，疲乏无力，语声低怯，自汗、畏风，反复感冒，腹胀，食少、便溏，舌质淡胖，边有齿龈，舌苔白或滑，脉细弱无力，或伴见哮病反复发作，妊娠或产后大便数日不解，脱肛，遗尿，浮肿等为特征的证候。

V003-N01936.definition: Characterized by low-pitched cough with thin, clear sputum, shortness of breath, panting, a low food intake, abdominal bloating and loose stools. The tongue is pale with a white, slippery coating. The pulse is weak. This pattern often results from qi deficiency of the lung and spleen.

V003-N01940.definition: 因脾肾两虚，精气亏损所致。临床以腰膝酸软，脐腹隐痛，小腹坠痛，腹胀、腹泻，纳呆，大便溏薄，或肢体浮肿，小便不利，头晕、耳鸣，面色晦黄或黯，舌质淡胖或暗，脉细弱，尺部无力，指纹淡，或伴见皮肤紫瘢、面颊蝶形红斑、口腔及外阴溃疡等迁延反复，遗精、滑泄，月经不调，胎萎不长或不孕、不育等为特征的证候。

V003-N01946.definition: Characterized by cold intolerance, cold limbs, a bright, pale complexion, low back soreness, abdominal pain with a cold sensation, chronic diarrhoea with stools that contain undigested food. Alternatively, oedema and scanty urine may be present. The tongue is pale and enlarged with a white, slippery coating. The pulse is deep, slow and weak. This pattern often occurs when yang qi deficiency of the spleen and kidney causes internal deficiency cold.

This pattern often occurs when qi of the spleen and stomach becomes stagnant.

V003-N01959.definition: Characterized by a burning stomach ache that alleviates after eating cool-property food, fever, thirst, abdominal pain/distension, and constipation. A foul breath, red, painful mouth ulcerations, gum swelling, pain, and bleeding may also be present. The tongue is red with a yellow coating. The pulse is rapid. This pattern often occurs when exuberant fire heat accumulates in the spleen and stomach.

V003-N01970.definition: Characterized by abdominal distension, low food intake, cold abdominal pain that alleviates with warmth and pressure, cold intolerance, cold limbs, and loose stools. The tongue is pale with a white, moist coating. The pulse is deep, slow and weak. This pattern often occurs when yang qi fails to warm the spleen and stomach.

Gastric upset, dull abdominal pain/distension, retching, and hiccups may also be present. The tongue is dry and red. The pulse is thready and rapid. This pattern often occurs when yin fluids fail to nourish the spleen and stomach.

V003-N01982.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi counterflow due to stomach cold
V003-N01982.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜胃证类｜胃寒证

V003-N01982.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N01982.label: 胃寒气逆证
V003-N01982.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi counterflow due to stomach cold; Cold-induced ascending of stomach qi pattern

V003-N01982.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N01982.definition: Characterized by vomiting, hiccups, belching, and cold stomach ache. The tongue coating is white. The pulse is wiry and tense. This pattern often occurs when cold affects the descending of stomach qi.

V003-N01982.label: 胃寒气逆证
V003-N01982.englishNames: Qi Regurgitating in case of Stomach-cold Syndrom
V003-N01982.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜气病｜气逆证
V003-N01982.definition: 因寒冷等刺激，使胃气失于和降而上逆，以呕吐或呃逆、嗳气，胃脘冷痛，苔白，脉弦紧等为常见症的证候。

V003-N01983.label: 胃寒痰逆证

V003-N01985.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜胃证类｜胃热证

V003-N01985.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V003-N01985.label: 胃火炽盛证
V003-N01985.aliases: 胃实热证； 胃火炽证； 胃热炽盛证； 胃热炽证； 胃火证
V003-N01985.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of intense exuberant stomach fire
V003-N01985.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜胃证类｜胃热证
V003-N01985.definition: 因嗜食辛辣温燥，胃热化火，或五志怫郁，气火犯胃，灼伤血络所致。临床以口角皲裂、糜烂或溃脓，口舌溃疡，灼痛、剧痛，不能进食，口臭，渴喜冷饮，或牙龈脓肿、灼痛，或齿衄、溢血不止，舌质红或绛，舌苔黄或黑燥，脉洪数，或伴见胃脘灼痛，大便燥结，小便短赤，烦躁，神志狂乱等为特征的证候。

V003-N01985.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V003-N01985.label: 胃热炽盛证
V003-N01985.aliases: 胃热壅盛证； 胃中积热证
V003-N01985.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜胃证类｜胃热证
V003-N01985.definition: 因饮食失节，过食肥甘、醇酒辛辣，导致积热内蕴，壅滞于胃所致。临床以胃脘灼痛、拒按，嘈杂、泛酸，或多食、善饥，渴喜冷饮，大便秘结，小便短黄，舌质红，舌苔黄，脉数，可伴见牙龈肿痛，齿衄，口臭等为特征的证候。

V003-N01985.label: 胃热证
V003-N01985.aliases: 胃火证； 胃热壅盛证； 胃火炽盛证
V003-N01985.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of stomach heat; stomach heat pattern/ syndrome; Stomach heat pattern
V003-N01985.path: ICD-11中文-传统医学部分｜传统医学证候｜脏腑证｜脾系证类

V003-N01985.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N01985.label: 胃火证
V003-N01985.aliases: 胃热炽盛证； 胃火炽盛证； 胃实热证； 胃热证； Stomach heat exuberance pattern； stomach fire exuberance pattern； Excess stomach heat pattern； Stomach heat pattern
V003-N01985.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N01985.definition: Characterized by a burning stomach pain with tenderness, thirst with a preference for cold drinks, gum swelling and pain, gum bleeding, constipation and scanty, yellow urine. Hunger after eating food and a foul breath may be present. The tongue is red with a yellow coating. The pulse is rapid. This pattern often occurs when accumulated fire heat in the stomach affects the descending of stomach qi.

V003-N01985.label: 胃火炽盛证
V003-N01985.englishNames: syndrome of exuberance of stomach fire
V003-N01985.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V003-N01985.definition: 火热炽盛，壅滞于冒，以胃脘灼痛，喜冷，发热口渴，或口臭，牙龈肿痛，齿衄，便结尿黄，舌红苔黄，脉数等为常见症的证候。

V003-N01985.label: 胃火炽盛证
V003-N01985.aliases: 胃火证； 胃热炽盛证； 胃热熏蒸证； 胃热证； 胃实热证； 胃中积热证
V003-N01985.pinyinNames: syndrome of exuberance of stomach fire; wei huo chi sheng zheng
V003-N01985.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜脾和胃证候｜胃系证候
V003-N01985.definition: 火热炽盛，壅滞于胃，以胃脘灼痛、喜冷，发热口渴，或口臭、牙龈肿痛、齿衄，便结尿黄，舌红苔黄，脉数等为常见症的证候。

V003-N01994.definition: a pattern/syndrome due to impairment of the stomach by pathogenic heat or caused by overeating of hot pungent food, mainly manifested by thirst, foul breath, hyperorexia, oliguria with dark urine, constipation, and ulceration of the mouth or gingiviti

V003-N01988.definition: 热积胃肠，俯气不畅，胃火上冲，以呃声洪亮有力，冲逆而出，口臭烦渴，多喜冷饮，脘腹满闷，大便秘结，小便短赤，苔黄燥，脉滑数为主要症状的证候。

V003-N01989.label: 胃热兼夹证

V003-N01990.label: 胃热津伤证
V003-N01990.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of stomach heat with fluid damage
V003-N01990.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜胃证类｜胃热证｜胃热兼夹证

V003-N01990.definition: 胃热炽盛，津液亏损，以胃脘灼痛，口渴欲饮，或消谷善饥，大便干结，舌红苔黄少津，脉数等为常见症的证候。

V003-N01991.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of stomach heat scorching yin
V003-N01991.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜胃证类｜胃热证｜胃热兼夹证

V003-N01992.label: 胃热血瘀证

V003-N01993.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N01993.label: 胃热阴虚证
V003-N01993.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of yin deficiency due to stomach heat; Stomach heat with yin deficiency pattern
V003-N01993.pinyinNames: wei re yin xu zheng; wèi rè yīn xū zhèng
V003-N01993.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N01993.definition: Characterized by a burning stomach ache, thirst, feverish sensations in the palms, soles and chest, and constipation. The tongue is dry and red with a scanty coating. The pulse is thready and rapid. This pattern often occurs when exuberant stomach heat consumes yin fluids.

V003-N01993.label: 胃热阴虚证
V003-N01993.englishNames: Syndrome of Yin Deficiency in case of Stomach-heat
V003-N01993.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜阴阳证候｜阴虚证
V003-N01993.definition: 胃热炽盛，阴液亏损，以胃脘灼痛，口渴，五心烦热，便结，舌红少苔少津，脉细数等常见症的证候。

V003-N01995.label: 胃热气滞证
V003-N01995.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of stomach heat with qi stagnation
V003-N01995.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜胃证类｜胃热证｜胃热炽盛证

V003-N01995.definition: 胃热炽盛，气机阻滞，以胃脘痞满、胀痛或灼痛、拒按，嗳气，口臭，便结，舌红苔黄，脉弦数等为常见症的证候。

V003-N01996.label: 胃热气逆证
V003-N01996.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi counterflow due to stomach heat
V003-N01996.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜胃证类｜胃热证｜胃热炽盛证

V003-N01996.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N01996.label: 胃热气逆证
V003-N01996.aliases: 胃火气逆证； Fire-induced ascending of stomach qi pattern
V003-N01996.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi counterflow due to stomach heat; Heat-induced ascending of stomach qi pattern
V003-N01996.pinyinNames: wei re qi ni zheng; wèi rè qì nì zhèng
V003-N01996.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N01996.definition: Characterized by vomiting, hiccups, belching, a burning stomach ache and thirst. The tongue is red with a yellow coating. The pulse is rapid. This pattern often occurs when fire/heat or hot, spicy food disturbs the descending of stomach qi.

V003-N01996.label: 胃热气逆证
V003-N01996.englishNames: Syndrome of Qi Regurgitating in case of Stomach-heat
V003-N01996.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜气病｜气逆证
V003-N01996.definition: 因火热之邪或辛辣之品等刺激，使胃失和降而上逆，以呕吐或呃逆、嗳气，胃脘灼痛，口渴，舌红苔黄，脉数等为常见症的证候。

V003-N01997.label: 胃热熏蒸证
V003-N01997.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜胃证类｜胃热证｜胃热炽盛证

V003-N01997.aliases: 胃火证； 胃热炽盛证； 胃热熏蒸证； 胃热证； 胃实热证； 胃中积热证
V003-N01997.pinyinNames: syndrome of exuberance of stomach fire; wei huo chi sheng zheng
V003-N01997.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜脾和胃证候｜胃系证候
V003-N01997.definition: 火热炽盛，壅滞于胃，以胃脘灼痛、喜冷，发热口渴，或口臭、牙龈肿痛、齿衄，便结尿黄，舌红苔黄，脉数等为常见症的证候。

V003-N01999.definition: Characterized by gastric distension/tightness and dull pain that alleviates upon pressure or after eating food, a poor appetite, and fatigue. The tongue is pale and tender. The pulse is weak. This pattern often occurs when stomach qi fails to perform absorption and transportation.

V003-N02011.definition: Characterized by a dry mouth and throat, hunger but no desire to eat food, and a dull stomach ache with a burning sensation. Gastric upset/distension, retching, hiccups and constipation may also be present. The tongue is dry and red. The pulse is thready and rapid. This pattern often occurs when yin fluids fail to nourish the stomach.

V003-N02027.definition: 脾气不足，运化失职，以食少，腹胀，食后尤甚，大便溏泻，神疲肢倦，舌淡苔白，脉缓弱等为常见症的证候。

The tongue is pale. The pulse is weak. This pattern often occurs when spleen qi fails to keep the blood within the vessels.

In severe cases, faecal incontinence may also be present. The tongue is pale. The pulse is weak. This pattern often occurs when spleen qi fails to secure the intestines.

Often occurs when chronic vomiting/diarrhoea or overuse of purgative medicine damage spleen qi. In children, this pattern occurs when congenital spleen and kidney deficiency generates internal wind.

V003-N02052.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜病因证候｜虫积证
V003-N02052.definition: 脾气虚弱，虫积肠道，以食少，腹胀，便溏，体瘦疲乏，腹部胀大，按之有条索状包块，或腹痛，大便排虫，舌淡苔白等为常见症的证候。

V003-N02053.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜脾和胃证候｜脾系证候
V003-N02053.definition: 脾气虚弱，血亏失濡，以食少，腹胀，大便干结，头晕，面白，舌淡脉细无力等为常见症的证候。

V003-N02054.path: ICD-11中文-传统医学部分｜传统医学证候｜脏腑证｜脾系证类

V003-N02054.label: 脾虚食积证
V003-N02054.aliases: 脾虚夹食证； Spleen deficiency with ingestion of food pattern
V003-N02054.englishNames: Spleen deficiency with food retention pattern; syndrome/pattern of spleen deficiency with food retention
V003-N02054.pinyinNames: pi xu shi ji zheng; pí xū shí jī zhèng
V003-N02054.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N02054.definition: Characterized by low food intake, abdominal distension, frequent diarrhoea, frequent abdominal distension/pain, acid reflux, a sensation of incomplete evacuation after diarrhoea, and strong-odoured stools. The tongue is pale with a greasy coating. This pattern often results from food retention in the stomach and intestines due to spleen failing to transport and transform.

V003-N02054.englishNames: syndrome of food retention due to spleen deficiency
V003-N02054.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V003-N02054.definition: 脾失健运，食积胃肠，以平素食少腹胀，经常腹泻，饮食稍有不慎则脘腹胀痛，嗳腐吐酸，腹泻不爽，大便腐臭，舌淡苔腻等为常见症的证候。

V003-N02055.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N02055.definition: Characterized by cold abdominal pain that alleviates upon warmth, vomiting of clear water, cold limbs, cold intolerance, loose stools, and clear, profuse urine. The tongue is pale, enlarged and tender with a white, moist coating. The pulse is deep and slow. This pattern often results from spleen yang deficiency coupled with internal cold.

V003-N02059.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N02059.definition: Characterized by a poor appetite, abdominal distension, constipation, weight loss, lassitude, scanty saliva, dry lips, and a low-grade fever. The tongue is red with a scanty coating. The pulse is thready and rapid. This pattern often occurs when spleen yin deficiency affects the transportation and transformation of the spleen and stomach.

V003-N02059.englishNames: syndrome of deficiency of spleen yin
V003-N02059.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V003-N02059.definition: 阴液亏虚，脾失健运，以纳呆，腹胀，便结，体瘦倦怠，涎少唇干，低热，舌红少苔，脉细数等为常见症的证候。

V003-N02059.definition: 阴液亏虚，脾失健运，以食欲不振、腹胀便结、体瘦倦怠、涎少唇干、低热、舌红少苔、脉细数等为常见症的证候。
